28104.title: Sizing up Corporate Restructuring in the COVID Crisis
28104.zh_title: 评估新冠疫情危机中的企业重组规模
28104.authors: Robin Greenwood, Benjamin Iverson, David Thesmar
28104.abstract: In the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, the financial and legal system will need to deal with a surge of financial distress in the business sector. Some firms will be able to survive, while others will face bankruptcy and thus need to be liquidated or reorganized. Many surviving firms will need to be downsized or acquired. In normal times, this triage is supported by the court system, banks, and financial markets. The goal of this paper is to size up the coming surge of financial distress, list the challenges it presents in the current environment, and analyze potential policy solutions. Overall, our analysis suggests that the two key issues will be court congestion and excess liquidation and failure of small firms.
28104.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情之后，金融和法律体系将需要应对企业部门激增的财务困境。一些企业将能够生存，而另一些则将面临破产，因此需要清算或重组。许多幸存的企业将需要缩减规模或被收购。在正常情况下，这种分类工作由法院系统、银行和金融市场支持。本文的目标是评估即将到来的财务困境浪潮的规模，列出其在当前环境下带来的挑战，并分析潜在的政策解决方案。总体而言，我们的分析表明，两个关键问题将是法院拥堵以及小企业的过度清算和倒闭。

28103.title: Ratings-Driven Demand and Systematic Price Fluctuations
28103.zh_title: 评级驱动的需求与系统性价格波动
28103.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Jiacui Li, Andrea Rossi, Yang Song
28103.abstract: We show that mutual fund ratings generate correlated demand that creates systematic price fluctuations. Mutual fund investors chase fund performance via Morningstar ratings. Until June 2002, funds pursuing the same investment style had highly correlated ratings. Therefore, rating-chasing investors directed capital into winning styles, generating style-level price pressures, which reverted over time. In June 2002, Morningstar reformed its methodology of equalizing ratings across styles. Style-level correlated demand via mutual funds immediately became muted, significantly altering the time-series and cross-sectional variation in style returns.
28103.zh_abstract: 我们表明，共同基金评级会产生相关需求，从而造成系统性价格波动。共同基金投资者通过晨星评级追逐基金业绩。直到2002年6月，采用相同投资风格的基金具有高度相关的评级。因此，追逐评级的投资者将资本引导至表现优异的风格，产生风格层面的价格压力，这种压力会随时间逆转。2002年6月，晨星改革了其跨风格均衡评级的方法。通过共同基金产生的风格层面相关需求立即减弱，显著改变了风格回报的时间序列和横截面变化。

28102.title: Volatility Expectations and Returns
28102.abstract: We provide evidence that agents have slow-moving beliefs about stock market volatility that lead to initial underreaction to volatility shocks followed by delayed overreaction. These dynamics are mirrored in the VIX and variance risk premiums which reflect investor expectations about volatility and are also supported in surveys and in firm-level option prices. We embed these expectations into an asset pricing model and find that the model can account for a number of stylized facts about market returns and return volatility which are difficult to reconcile, including a weak, or even negative, risk-return tradeoff.
28102.zh_abstract: 我们提供了证据，表明经济主体对股市波动率具有缓慢变化的信念，这导致对波动率冲击最初反应不足，随后反应过度。这些动态反映在VIX指数和方差风险溢价中，它们反映了投资者对波动率的预期，并在调查和公司层面的期权价格中得到支持。我们将这些预期嵌入到一个资产定价模型中，发现该模型可以解释关于市场回报和回报波动率的一系列难以调和的典型事实，包括一个微弱甚至负向的风险-回报权衡。

28101.title: The Antebellum Roots of Distinctively Black Names
28101.zh_title: 内战前独特黑人姓名的根源
28101.authors: Trevon Logan, Lisa D. Cook, John Parman
28101.abstract: This paper explores the existence of distinctively Black names in the antebellum era. Building on recent research that documents the existence of a national naming pattern for African American males in the late nineteenth and early twentieth centuries (Cook, Logan and Parman 2014), we analyze three distinct and novel antebellum data sources and uncover three stylized facts. First, the Black names identified by Cook, Logan and Parman using post-Civil War data are common names among Blacks before Emancipation. Second, these same Black names are racially distinctive in the antebellum period. Third, the racial distinctiveness of the names increases from the early 1800s to the time of the Civil War. Taken together, these facts provide support for the claim that Black naming patterns existed in the antebellum era and that racial distinctiveness in naming patterns was an established practice well before Emancipation. These findings further challenge the view that Black names are a product of twentieth century phenomena such as the Civil Rights Movement.
28101.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了内战前时期是否存在独特的黑人姓名。基于近期研究（Cook, Logan and Parman 2014）所记录的19世纪末20世纪初非裔美国男性存在全国性命名模式这一发现，我们分析了三个不同的、新颖的内战前数据来源，并揭示了三个典型化事实。第一，Cook、Logan和Parman利用内战后数据所识别的黑人姓名，在解放前黑人群体中已是常见姓名。第二，这些相同的黑人姓名在内战前时期具有种族独特性。第三，这些姓名的种族独特性从19世纪初到内战时期不断增强。综合来看，这些事实支持了以下论断：黑人命名模式在内战前时期就已存在，且命名模式中的种族独特性在解放前早已是既定实践。这些发现进一步挑战了黑人姓名是20世纪现象（如民权运动）产物的观点。

28100.title: Search and Information Frictions on Global E-Commerce Platforms: Evidence from AliExpress
28100.zh_title: 全球电商平台上的搜索与信息摩擦：来自速卖通的证据
28100.authors: Jie Bai, Maggie Chen, Jin Liu, Xiaosheng Mu, Daniel Yi Xu
28100.abstract: We study how search and information frictions shape market dynamics in global e-commerce. Observational data and self-collected quality measures from AliExpress establish the existence of search and information frictions. A randomized experiment that offers new exporters exogenous demand and information shocks demonstrates the potential role of sales accumulation in enhancing seller visibility and overcoming these demand frictions. However, we show theoretically and quantitatively that this demand-reinforcement mechanism is undermined by the large number of online exporters. Our structural model rationalizes the experimental findings and quantifies efficiency gains from reducing the number of inactive sellers.
28100.zh_abstract: 我们研究了搜索摩擦和信息摩擦如何塑造全球电子商务中的市场动态。来自速卖通的观测数据和自行收集的质量度量证实了搜索摩擦和信息摩擦的存在。一项随机实验为新的出口商提供了外生的需求冲击和信息冲击，展示了销售积累在提升卖家可见度并克服这些需求摩擦方面的潜在作用。然而，我们在理论上和定量上表明，这种需求强化机制因在线出口商数量庞大而受到削弱。我们的结构模型使实验结果合理化，并量化了减少非活跃卖家数量所带来的效率提升。

28136.title: Auto Dealer Loan Intermediation: Consumer Behavior and Competitive Effects
28136.zh_title: 汽车经销商贷款中介：消费者行为与竞争效应
28136.authors: Andreas Grunewald, Jonathan A. Lanning, David C. Low, Tobias Salz
28136.abstract: This paper studies the intermediation of auto loans through auto dealers using new and comprehensive administrative data. The arrangements between auto dealers and lenders incentivize dealers to increase loan prices. We leverage details of the corresponding contracts to demonstrate that many consumers are less responsive to finance charges than to vehicle charges. Taking this behavior into account, we estimate an equilibrium model of dealer price setting and lender competition. We explore counterfactuals where dealers have no discretion to price loans and final rates are set by lenders instead. We find large gains in consumer surplus from such a policy.
28136.zh_abstract: 本文利用新的、全面的行政数据研究通过汽车经销商进行的汽车贷款中介。汽车经销商与贷款人之间的安排激励经销商提高贷款价格。我们利用相应合同的细节来证明，许多消费者对融资费用的反应不如对车辆费用的反应敏感。考虑到这种行为，我们估计了一个经销商定价和贷款人竞争的均衡模型。我们探讨了反事实情景，其中经销商没有定价贷款的自由裁量权，最终利率由贷款人设定。我们发现，这种政策带来了消费者剩余的大幅增加。
28136.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：G41, G51, L0, L13, L5, L62

28135.title: Designing Efficient Contact Tracing Through Risk-Based Quarantining
28135.zh_title: 通过基于风险的隔离设计高效接触者追踪
28135.authors: Andrew Perrault, Marie Charpignon, Jonathan Gruber, Milind Tambe, Maimuna Majumder
28135.abstract: Contact tracing for COVID-19 is especially challenging because transmission often occurs in the absence of symptoms and because a purported 20% of cases cause 80% of infections, resulting in a small risk of infection for some contacts and a high risk for others. Here, we introduce risk-based quarantine, a system for contact tracing where each cluster (a group of individuals with a common source of exposure) is observed for symptoms when tracing begins, and clusters that do not display them are released from quarantine. We show that, under our assumptions, risk-based quarantine reduces the amount of quarantine time served by more than 30%, while achieving a reduction in transmission similar to standard contact tracing policies where all contacts are quarantined for two weeks. We compare our proposed risk-based quarantine approach against test-driven release policies, which fail to achieve a comparable level of transmission reduction due to the inability of tests to detect exposed people who are not yet infectious but will eventually become so. Additionally, test-based release policies are expensive, limiting their effectiveness in low-resource environments, whereas the costs imposed by risk-based quarantine are primarily in terms of labor and organization.
28135.zh_abstract: COVID-19的接触者追踪尤其具有挑战性，因为传播通常发生在无症状情况下，并且据称20%的病例导致了80%的感染，导致一些接触者的感染风险很小，而另一些则很高。在此，我们引入了基于风险的隔离，这是一种接触者追踪系统，其中每个集群（一组具有共同暴露源的个体）在追踪开始时被观察症状，未出现症状的集群被解除隔离。我们证明，在我们的假设下，基于风险的隔离将隔离时间减少了30%以上，同时实现了与所有接触者隔离两周的标准接触者追踪政策相似的传播减少效果。我们将提出的基于风险的隔离方法与基于检测的释放政策进行比较，后者由于无法检测到尚未具有传染性但最终会具有传染性的暴露者，未能实现可比的传播减少效果。此外，基于检测的释放政策成本高昂，限制了其在资源匮乏环境中的有效性，而基于风险的隔离所施加的成本主要在于劳动力和组织方面。

28134.title: Private Equity Returns: Empirical Evidence from the Business Credit Card Securitization Market
28134.zh_title: 私募股权回报：来自商业信用卡证券化市场的经验证据
28134.abstract: We present a new approach for estimating private equity returns using secondary market prices for entrepreneurial business credit card securitizations. We show that the market requires a significantly higher premium for entrepreneurial credit risk than for household credit risk. Entrepreneurial risk is systematic in nature and has much in common with risks in corporate bond and real-estate-backed lending markets. The expected return on private equity is on the order of 14 percent and the volatility of private equity returns is comparable to that of the smallest quintile of publicly traded firms.
28134.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新方法，利用创业企业商业信用卡证券化的二级市场价格来估计私募股权回报。我们表明，市场对创业信用风险要求的溢价显著高于对家庭信用风险的要求。创业风险本质上是系统性的，与公司债券和房地产支持贷款市场的风险有许多共同之处。私募股权的预期回报率约为14%，其回报波动性与公开交易公司最小五分位数的波动性相当。

28132.title: Geospatial Analysis of the September 2020 Coronavirus Outbreak at the University of Wisconsin – Madison: Did a Cluster of Local Bars Play a Critical Role?
28132.zh_title: 2020年9月威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校新冠病毒爆发的空间分析：当地酒吧集群是否发挥了关键作用？
28132.abstract: We combined smartphone mobility data with census track-based reports of positive case counts to study a coronavirus outbreak at the University of Wisconsin-Madison campus, where nearly three thousand students had become infected by the end of September 2020. We identified a cluster of twenty bars located at the epicenter of the outbreak, in close proximity to on-campus residence halls and off-campus housing. Smartphones originating from the two hardest hit residence halls (Sellery and Witte), where about one in five students were infected, were 2.95 times more likely to visit the 20-bar cluster than smartphones originating in two more distant, less affected residence halls (Ogg and Smith). By contrast, smartphones from Sellery-Witte were only 1.55 times more likely than those from Ogg-Smith to visit a group of 68 restaurants in the same area. Physical proximity thus had a much stronger influence on bar visitation than on restaurant visitation (rate ratio 1.91, 95% CI 1.29-2.85, p = 0.0007). In a separate analysis, we determined the per-capita rates of visitation to the 20-bar cluster and to the 68-restaurant comparison group by smartphones originating in each of 19 census tracts in the university area, and related these visitation rates to the per-capita incidence of newly positive coronavirus tests in each census tract. In a multivariate regression, the visitation rate to the bar cluster was a significant determinant of infection rates (elasticity 0.90, 95% CI 0.26-1.54, p = 0.009), while the restaurant visitation rate showed no such relationship. Researchers and public health professionals need to think more about the potential super-spreader effects of clusters and networks of places, rather than individual sites.
28132.zh_abstract: 我们将智能手机移动数据与基于人口普查区的阳性病例报告相结合，研究了威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校校园的新冠病毒爆发事件，截至2020年9月底，近3000名学生被感染。我们识别出一个由20家酒吧组成的集群，位于爆发的中心，紧邻校内宿舍和校外住房。来自受影响最严重的两个宿舍楼（Sellery和Witte，约五分之一的学生被感染）的智能手机，访问这20家酒吧集群的可能性是来自两个较远、受影响较轻的宿舍楼（Ogg和Smith）的智能手机的2.95倍。相比之下，来自Sellery-Witte的智能手机访问同一区域68家餐厅组的可能性仅为来自Ogg-Smith的1.55倍。因此，物理距离对酒吧访问的影响远大于对餐厅访问的影响（比率比1.91，95%置信区间1.29-2.85，p=0.0007）。在另一项分析中，我们确定了来自大学区域19个人口普查区的智能手机对这20家酒吧集群和68家餐厅对照组的访问率，并将这些访问率与每个人口普查区的人均新冠病毒新阳性病例发生率相关联。在多元回归中，酒吧集群的访问率是感染率的显著决定因素（弹性0.90，95%置信区间0.26-1.54，p=0.009），而餐厅访问率则没有显示出这种关系。研究人员和公共卫生专业人员需要更多地思考场所集群和网络的潜在超级传播者效应，而不是单个场所。

28131.title: The Impact of the COVID-19 Pandemic and Policy Response on Health Care Utilization: Evidence from County-level Medical Claims and Cellphone data
28131.zh_title: COVID-19大流行及政策应对对医疗利用的影响：来自县级医疗索赔和手机数据的证据
28131.authors: Jonathan H. Cantor, Neeraj Sood, Dena Bravata, Megan Pera, Christopher M. Whaley
28131.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has forced federal, state and local policymakers to respond by legislating, enacting, and enforcing social distancing policies. However, the impact of these policies on healthcare utilization in the United States has been largely unexplored. We examine the impact of county-level shelter in place ordinances on healthcare utilization using two unique datasets—employer-sponsored insurance for over 6 million people in the US and cell phone location data. We find that introduction of these policies was associated with reductions in the use of preventive care, elective care, and the number of weekly visits to physician offices and hospitals. However, controlling for county-level exposure to the COVID-19 pandemic reduces the impact of these policies. Our results imply that while social distancing policies do lead to reductions in healthcare utilization, much of these reductions would have occurred even in the absence of these policies.
28131.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行迫使联邦、州和地方政策制定者通过立法、颁布和执行社交距离政策来应对。然而，这些政策对美国医疗利用的影响在很大程度上尚未被探索。我们利用两个独特的数据集——覆盖美国超过600万人的雇主赞助保险和手机位置数据——研究了县级居家令对医疗利用的影响。我们发现，这些政策的实施与预防性护理、选择性护理的使用减少以及每周就诊医生办公室和医院的次数减少相关。然而，控制县级COVID-19大流行暴露程度后，这些政策的影响有所减弱。我们的结果表明，虽然社交距离政策确实导致医疗利用减少，但即使没有这些政策，这些减少中的大部分也会发生。

28130.title: Policy Instrument Choice with Coasean Provision of Public Goods
28130.zh_title: 科斯式公共品供给下的政策工具选择
28130.abstract: We examine the interplay between environmental policy instrument choice (i.e., prices vs. quantities) and private provision of public goods, which in this context we denote "Coasean provision." Coasean provision captures private provision of environmental public goods due to consumer preferences for environmentally friendly goods and services, incentives for corporate environmental management, environmental philanthropy, and even overlapping jurisdictions of policy. We show theoretically that even in a world of perfect certainty, the presence of Coasean provision distinctly affects instrument choice, based on both the efficiency criterion and distributional consequences. We also generalize the analysis to account for uncertainty using the classic Weitzman (1974) framework. Our findings suggest that the increasing prevalence of Coasean provision motivates a need to rethink the design of effective and efficient environmental policy instruments. This arises because policy instrument choice can have a significant impact on the environmental commitments of individuals, companies, and states, and vice-versa, with clear implications for overall economic welfare and policy preferences among polluters, citizens, and government revenue.
28130.zh_abstract: 我们研究了环境政策工具选择（即价格与数量）与私人提供公共品之间的相互作用，在此背景下我们将其称为“科斯式供给”。科斯式供给涵盖了由于消费者对环保商品和服务的偏好、企业环境管理的激励、环境慈善甚至政策重叠管辖而导致的私人提供环境公共品。我们在理论上表明，即使在完全确定的世界中，科斯式供给的存在也会基于效率标准和分配后果显著影响工具选择。我们还使用经典的Weitzman（1974）框架将分析推广到考虑不确定性。我们的发现表明，科斯式供给的日益普遍促使人们需要重新思考有效且高效的环境政策工具的设计。这是因为政策工具选择可能对个人、公司和国家的环境承诺产生重大影响，反之亦然，这对整体经济福利以及污染者、公民和政府收入之间的政策偏好具有明确的影响。

28129.title: Improving Public Sector Management at Scale? Experimental Evidence on School Governance India
28129.zh_title: 大规模改善公共部门管理？印度学校治理的实验证据
28129.abstract: We present results from a large-scale experimental evaluation of an ambitious attempt to improve management quality in Indian schools (implemented in 1,774 randomly-selected schools). The intervention featured several global “best practices” including comprehensive assessments, detailed school ratings, and customized school improvement plans. It did not, however, change accountability or incentives. We find that the assessments were near-universally completed, and that the ratings were informative, but the intervention had no impact on either school functioning or student outcomes. Yet, the program was perceived to be successful and scaled up to cover over 600,000 schools nationally. We find using a matched-pair design that the scaled-up program continued to be ineffective at improving student learning in the state we study. We also conduct detailed qualitative interviews with frontline officials and find that the main impact of the program on the ground was to increase required reporting and paperwork. Our results illustrate how ostensibly well-designed programs, that appear effective based on administrative measures of compliance, may be ineffective in practice.
28129.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项大规模实验评估的结果，该评估针对一项旨在提高印度学校管理质量的雄心勃勃的尝试（在1774所随机选择的学校中实施）。该干预措施包含了几项全球“最佳实践”，包括全面评估、详细的学校评级和定制的学校改进计划。然而，它并没有改变问责制或激励措施。我们发现，评估几乎普遍完成，评级具有信息量，但该干预措施对学校运作或学生成绩没有影响。然而，该计划被认为成功，并在全国范围内推广到超过60万所学校。我们使用配对设计发现，在我们研究的州，推广后的计划仍然无法有效提高学生学习水平。我们还对一线官员进行了详细的定性访谈，发现该计划在实地的主要影响是增加了所需的报告和文书工作。我们的结果说明了表面上设计良好的计划，基于行政合规性衡量看似有效，但在实践中可能无效。
28129.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C93, H75, I28, O15

28128.title: Cite Unseen: Theory and Evidence on the Effect of Open Access on Cites to Academic Articles Across the Quality Spectrum
28128.zh_title: 看不见的引用：开放获取对跨质量谱系学术文章引用的理论与证据
28128.abstract: Our previous paper (McCabe and Snyder 2014) contained the provocative result that, despite a positive average effect, open access reduces cites to some articles, in particular those published in lower-tier journals. We propose a model in which open access leads more readers to acquire the full text, yielding more cites from some, but fewer cites from those who would have cited the article based on superficial knowledge but who refrain once they learn that the article is a bad match. We test the theory with data for over 200,000 science articles binned by cites received during a pre-study period. Consistent with the theory, the marginal effect of open access is negative for the least-cited articles, positive for the most cited, and generally monotonic for quality levels in between. Also consistent with the theory is a magnification of these effects for articles placed on PubMed Central, one of the broadest open-access platforms, and the differential pattern of results for cites from insiders versus outsiders to the article’s field.
28128.zh_abstract: 我们之前的论文（McCabe and Snyder 2014）包含了一个挑衅性的结果：尽管平均效应为正，但开放获取减少了对某些文章的引用，特别是那些发表在低级别期刊上的文章。我们提出了一个模型，其中开放获取导致更多读者获取全文，从而从一些人那里获得更多引用，但那些基于肤浅知识会引用文章的人，一旦了解到文章不匹配就会放弃引用，从而减少引用。我们使用超过20万篇科学文章的数据来检验该理论，这些文章根据研究前期间收到的引用进行了分箱。与理论一致，开放获取的边际效应对引用最少的文章为负，对引用最多的文章为正，并且对于中间质量水平大致单调。同样与理论一致的是，这些效应在放置在PubMed Central（最广泛的开放获取平台之一）上的文章中被放大，以及来自文章领域内部人士与外部人士的引用结果存在差异模式。
28128.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D83, L17, O33

28127.title: The Value of a Cure: An Asset Pricing Perspective
28127.zh_title: 治愈的价值：资产定价视角
28127.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Timothy Johnson, Suresh Sundaresan, Steven Zheng
28127.abstract: We provide an estimate of the value of a cure using the joint behavior of stock prices and a vaccine progress indicator during the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. Our indicator is based on the chronology of stage-by-stage progress of individual vaccines and related news. We construct a general equilibrium regime-switching model of repeated pandemics and stages of vaccine progress wherein the representative agent withdraws labor and alters consumption endogenously to mitigate health risk. The value of a cure in the resulting asset-pricing framework is intimately linked to the relative labor supply across states. The observed stock market response to vaccine progress serves to identify this quantity, allowing us to use the model to estimate the economy-wide welfare gain that would be attributable to a cure. In our estimation, and with standard preference parameters, the value of the ability to end the pandemic is worth 5-15% of total wealth. This value rises substantially when there is uncertainty about the frequency and duration of pandemics. Agents place almost as much value on the ability to resolve the uncertainty as they do on the value of the cure itself. This effect is stronger – not weaker – when agents have a preference for later resolution of uncertainty. The policy implication is that understanding the fundamental biological and social determinants of future pandemics may be as important as resolving the immediate crisis.
28127.zh_abstract: 我们利用当前COVID-19大流行期间股票价格与疫苗进展指标的联合行为，提供了治愈价值的估计。我们的指标基于单个疫苗逐阶段进展及相关新闻的时间顺序。我们构建了一个一般均衡体制转换模型，描述反复出现的大流行和疫苗进展阶段，其中代表性代理人内生地调整劳动供给和消费以减轻健康风险。在由此产生的资产定价框架中，治愈的价值与各状态下的相对劳动供给密切相关。观察到的股票市场对疫苗进展的反应有助于识别这一数量，使我们能够使用该模型估计可归因于治愈的整个经济福利收益。在我们的估计中，使用标准偏好参数，结束大流行的能力价值占总财富的5-15%。当对大流行的频率和持续时间存在不确定性时，这一价值会大幅上升。代理人赋予解决不确定性的能力几乎与治愈本身的价值一样高。当代理人偏好于更晚解决不确定性时，这种效应更强——而不是更弱。政策含义是，理解未来大流行的基本生物学和社会决定因素可能与解决当前危机同样重要。
28127.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：D5, G12, I1, Q54

28126.title: Migration and Fiscal Externality: US vs. Europe
28126.zh_title: 移民与财政外部性：美国与欧洲的比较
28126.abstract: The paper compares migration policy and welfare state generosity between America and Europe. There is more selective skill-based migration policy in the US compared to the European Union. Policy coordination among states within the federal system on migration, taxes, and social benefits among states within the US federal system is stronger than among countries within the European Union. Fiscal externality, triggered by migration and tax competition among members of the federal system may explain in part these US-Europe differences in policies.
28126.zh_abstract: 本文比较了美国和欧洲的移民政策与福利国家慷慨程度。与欧盟相比，美国有更具选择性的基于技能的移民政策。美国联邦体系内各州之间在移民、税收和社会福利方面的政策协调强于欧盟各成员国之间。由联邦体系内成员之间的移民和税收竞争引发的财政外部性，可能部分解释了美国和欧洲在这些政策上的差异。

28125.title: The Stability and Predictive Power of Financial Literacy: Evidence from Longitudinal Data
28125.zh_title: 金融素养的稳定性与预测能力：来自纵向数据的证据
28125.authors: Marco Angrisani, Jeremy Burke, Annamaria Lusardi, Gary Mottola
28125.abstract: We administered the FINRA Foundation’s National Financial Capability Study questionnaire to members of the RAND American Life Panel (ALP) in 2012 and 2018. Using this unique, longitudinal data set, we investigate the evolution of financial literacy over time and shed light on the causal effect of financial knowledge on financial outcomes. Over a six-year observation period, financial literacy appears to be rather stable, with a slight tendency to decline at older ages. Moreover and importantly, financial literacy has significant predictive power for future financial outcomes, even after controlling for baseline outcomes and a wide set of demographics and individual characteristics that influence financial decision making. This estimated relationship is significantly stronger for older individuals, for women, and for those with lower income than for their counterparts in the study. Altogether, our findings suggest that differences in the stock of financial knowledge may lead to increasing inequality over the life course.
28125.zh_abstract: 我们于2012年和2018年对兰德美国生活小组（ALP）成员进行了FINRA基金会全国金融能力调查问卷。利用这一独特的纵向数据集，我们研究了金融素养随时间的变化，并揭示了金融知识对金融结果的因果影响。在六年的观察期内，金融素养表现出相当稳定的特征，仅在老年阶段有轻微下降趋势。此外，重要的是，即使在控制了基线结果以及影响金融决策的广泛人口统计特征和个人特征后，金融素养对未来金融结果仍具有显著的预测能力。对于年长者、女性以及低收入群体而言，这种估计关系显著强于研究中的其他群体。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，金融知识存量的差异可能导致生命周期内不平等程度的加剧。

28124.title: Liquidity Risk at Large U.S. Banks
28124.zh_title: 美国大型银行的流动性风险
28124.abstract: This paper studies liquidity risk at the six largest U.S. banks. The starting point is the stress tests performed under the Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) regulation, which compare a bank’s liquid assets to its loss of cash in a stress scenario that regulators say is based on the 2008 financial crisis. These tests find that all of the large banks could endure a liquidity crisis for 30 days without running out of cash. This paper argues, however, that some of the assumptions in the LCR stress scenario are not pessimistic enough to capture what could happen in a crisis like 2008. The paper then proposes changes in the dubious assumptions and performs revised stress tests. For 2019 Q4, the revised tests suggest it is unlikely that any of the six banks would survive a liquidity crisis for 30 days. This negative finding is most clear-cut for Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.
28124.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国六大银行的流动性风险。研究起点是流动性覆盖率（LCR）监管下的压力测试，该测试将银行的流动资产与其在监管机构声称基于2008年金融危机的压力情景下的现金损失进行比较。这些测试发现，所有大型银行都能在30天内经受住流动性危机而不耗尽现金。然而，本文认为，LCR压力情景中的某些假设不够悲观，无法捕捉到类似2008年危机中可能发生的情况。随后，本文对可疑假设提出了修改，并进行了修订后的压力测试。对于2019年第四季度，修订后的测试表明，这六家银行中任何一家都不太可能在流动性危机中存活30天。这一负面发现对于高盛和摩根士丹利最为明确。

28123.title: Foreign Shocks as Granular Fluctuations
28123.zh_title: 作为颗粒波动的外国冲击
28123.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Andrei A. Levchenko, Isabelle Mejean
28123.abstract: This paper uses a dataset covering the universe of French firm-level value added, imports, and exports over the period 1995-2007 and a quantitative multi-country model to study the international transmission of business cycle shocks at both the micro and the macro levels. Because the largest firms are the most likely to trade internationally, foreign shocks are transmitted to the domestic economy primarily through the large firms. We first document a novel stylized fact: larger French firms are significantly more sensitive to foreign GDP growth. We then implement a quantitative framework calibrated to the full extent of the observed heterogeneity in firm size, exporting, and importing. We simulate the propagation of foreign shocks to the French economy and report one micro and one macro finding. At the micro level heterogeneity across firms predominates: 45 to 75% of the impact of foreign fluctuations on French GDP is accounted for by the “foreign granular residual” – the term capturing the larger firms’ greater responsiveness to the foreign shocks. At the macro level, firm heterogeneity attenuates the impact of foreign shocks, with the GDP responses 10 to 20% larger in a representative firm model compared to the baseline model.
28123.zh_abstract: 本文利用覆盖1995-2007年间法国企业层面增加值、进口和出口全样本的数据集，以及一个定量多国模型，从微观和宏观两个层面研究商业周期冲击的国际传导。由于最大的企业最有可能进行国际贸易，外国冲击主要通过大型企业传导至国内经济。我们首先记录了一个新颖的风格化事实：较大的法国企业对外国GDP增长显著更为敏感。然后，我们实施了一个定量框架，该框架校准了企业规模、出口和进口中观察到的全部异质性。我们模拟了外国冲击向法国经济的传播，并报告了一个微观发现和一个宏观发现。在微观层面，企业间的异质性占主导地位：外国波动对法国GDP影响的45%至75%可由“外国颗粒残差”解释——该术语捕捉了大型企业对外国冲击更强的反应性。在宏观层面，企业异质性减弱了外国冲击的影响，与基准模型相比，代表性企业模型中的GDP反应要大10%至20%。
28123.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：E32, F15, F23, F44, F62, L14

28122.title: How Do Mass Shootings Affect Community Wellbeing?
28122.zh_title: 大规模枪击事件如何影响社区福祉？
28122.abstract: Over the past four decades, more than 2,300 people have been the victims of mass shootings involving a firearm in the United States. Research shows that mass shootings have significant detrimental effects on the direct victims and their families. However, relatively little is known about the extent to which the impacts of these tragedies are transmitted into communities where they occur, and how they influence people beyond those directly affected. This study uses nationally representative data from the Gallup-Healthways survey to assess the spillover effects of mass shootings on community wellbeing and emotional health outcomes that capture community satisfaction, sense of safety, and levels of stress and worry. We leverage differences in the timing of mass shooting events across counties between 2008 and 2017. We find that mass shootings reduce both community wellbeing and emotional health. According to our results, a mass shooting is associated with a 27 percentage point decline in the likelihood of having excellent community wellbeing and a 13 percentage point decline in the likelihood of having excellent emotional health four weeks following the incident. The effects are stronger and longer lasting among individuals exposed to deadlier mass shootings. Furthermore, the reductions in wellbeing are greater for parents with children below age 18. Our findings suggest that mass shootings have significant societal costs and create negative spillover effects that extend beyond those immediately exposed.
28122.zh_abstract: 在过去四十年中，美国有超过2300人成为涉及枪支的大规模枪击事件的受害者。研究表明，大规模枪击事件对直接受害者及其家庭有显著的负面影响。然而，关于这些悲剧的影响在多大程度上传导至其发生的社区，以及如何影响直接受影响者之外的人群，我们知之甚少。本研究利用盖洛普-健康之路调查中具有全国代表性的数据，评估大规模枪击事件对社区福祉和情绪健康结果的溢出效应，这些结果涵盖了社区满意度、安全感以及压力和担忧水平。我们利用了2008年至2017年间各县大规模枪击事件发生时间的差异。我们发现，大规模枪击事件降低了社区福祉和情绪健康。根据我们的结果，大规模枪击事件与事件发生四周后拥有极好社区福祉的可能性下降27个百分点，以及拥有极好情绪健康的可能性下降13个百分点相关。对于暴露于更致命大规模枪击事件的个体，这种影响更强且更持久。此外，对于有18岁以下子女的父母，福祉的下降幅度更大。我们的研究结果表明，大规模枪击事件具有显著的社会成本，并产生超出直接受影响者的负面溢出效应。
28122.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE；JEL：I1, I12, I18, I31, K4

28121.title: Consumer Vulnerability and Behavioral Biases
28121.zh_title: 消费者脆弱性与行为偏差
28121.abstract: A wealth of evidence shows that individuals are biased and firms can often exploit consumers' behavioral biases in their contract designs. In this paper, we study how vulnerable biased individuals are to their own behavioral biases in market equilibrium, and focus on the role of risk aversion and intertemporal elasticity of substitution (IES). We measure consumer vulnerability by the percentage loss in a consumer's equilibrium certainty equivalent from a market with non-biased consumers to that with biased ones. We examine several important behavioral biases that have been extensively studied in the literature, including the impact of biased beliefs (either over- or under-confidence) in an insurance market, the impact of present bias and naïveté about present bias in a dynamic model of credit contract design, the impact of projection bias about habit formation, and the impact of expectation-based loss aversion on an investor's portfolio choice. We show that consumer vulnerability to all four commonly studied behavioral biases has a non-monotonic relationship with risk aversion or IES. This is in striking contrast to the deviations in the equilibrium allocations from the rational benchmark, which are often monotonic to the risk aversion or IES. We also consider a setting of biased agents with Epstein-Zin preferences to isolate the effect of risk aversion from that of IES.
28121.zh_abstract: 大量证据表明，个体存在偏差，企业常常可以在合同设计中利用消费者的行为偏差。在本文中，我们研究在市场均衡中，有偏差的个体对其自身行为偏差的脆弱程度，并重点关注风险厌恶和跨期替代弹性（IES）的作用。我们通过消费者在无偏差消费者市场与有偏差消费者市场中的均衡确定性等价之间的百分比损失来衡量消费者脆弱性。我们考察了文献中广泛研究的几种重要行为偏差，包括保险市场中偏差信念（过度自信或信心不足）的影响、动态信贷合同设计模型中现时偏差及对现时偏差天真认知的影响、关于习惯形成的投射偏差的影响，以及基于期望的损失厌恶对投资者投资组合选择的影响。我们表明，消费者对所有四种常见行为偏差的脆弱性与风险厌恶或IES呈非单调关系。这与均衡配置相对于理性基准的偏差形成鲜明对比，后者通常与风险厌恶或IES呈单调关系。我们还考虑了具有Epstein-Zin偏好的偏差代理人设定，以将风险厌恶的影响与IES的影响分离开来。
28121.meta: Programs：IO, PE, TWP；JEL：D60, D81, D86, D91

28120.title: Public Mobility Data Enables COVID-19 Forecasting and Management at Local and Global Scales
28120.zh_title: 公共流动性数据助力全球和地方层面的COVID-19预测与管理
28120.authors: Cornelia Ilin, Sébastien E. Annan-Phan, Xiao Hui Tai, Shikhar Mehra, Solomon M. Hsiang, Joshua E. Blumenstock
28120.abstract: Policymakers everywhere are working to determine the set of restrictions that will effectively contain the spread of COVID-19 without excessively stifling economic activity. We show that publicly available data on human mobility — collected by Google, Facebook, and other providers — can be used to evaluate the effectiveness of non-pharmaceutical interventions and forecast the spread of COVID-19. This approach relies on simple and transparent statistical models, and involves minimal assumptions about disease dynamics. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach using local and regional data from China, France, Italy, South Korea, and the United States, as well as national data from 80 countries around the world.
28120.zh_abstract: 各地的政策制定者都在努力确定一套既能有效遏制COVID-19传播，又不会过度抑制经济活动的限制措施。我们表明，由谷歌、Facebook及其他提供商收集的公开可用的人类流动性数据，可用于评估非药物干预措施的有效性并预测COVID-19的传播。这种方法依赖于简单透明的统计模型，并对疾病动态做出最小假设。我们利用来自中国、法国、意大利、韩国和美国的地方和区域数据，以及来自全球80个国家的国家数据，证明了这种方法的有效性。
28120.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：C1, C8, H12, H70, I18, O2, R40

28119.title: The Collateral Link between Volatility and Risk Sharing
28119.zh_title: 波动性与风险分担之间的抵押品联系
28119.abstract: We show that aggregate volatility affects the extent to which agents can share idiosyncratic risks through the valuation of collateral. Both private and public assets are used in insurance markets as collateral, but their exposure to volatility differs. While aggregate volatility decreases the value of private assets—they are exposed to more variation—it increases the value of public assets—they become more valuable to smooth consumption intertemporally. Hence, a more volatile economy tends to damage risk sharing when the composition of collateral is biased toward private assets. As we show that a stable economy is more propitious to the creation of private collateral, stability makes risk sharing increasingly fragile to volatility shocks. We find empirical evidence that the higher use of private assets in the U.S. has affected the sensitivity of risk sharing to aggregate volatility as predicted by our model.
28119.zh_abstract: 我们表明，总体波动性通过抵押品估值影响代理人分担特质风险的程度。私人和公共资产都在保险市场中用作抵押品，但它们对波动性的暴露程度不同。总体波动性降低了私人资产的价值——它们面临更多变化——但增加了公共资产的价值——它们在跨期平滑消费方面变得更有价值。因此，当抵押品构成偏向私人资产时，一个波动性更大的经济体往往会损害风险分担。由于我们表明一个稳定的经济体更有利于私人抵押品的创造，稳定性使得风险分担对波动性冲击越来越敏感。我们发现了实证证据，表明美国对私人资产的更多使用影响了风险分担对总体波动性的敏感性，正如我们的模型所预测的那样。
28119.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, G12, G18

28118.title: Open Banking: Credit Market Competition When Borrowers Own the Data
28118.zh_title: 开放银行：当借款人拥有数据时的信贷市场竞争
28118.authors: Zhiguo He, Jing Huang, Jidong Zhou
28118.abstract: Open banking facilitates data sharing consented by customers who generate the data, with a regulatory goal of promoting competition between traditional banks and challenger fintech entrants. We study lending market competition when sharing banks' customer data enables better borrower screening or targeting by fintech lenders. Open banking could make the entire financial industry better off yet leave all borrowers worse off, even if borrowers could choose whether to share their data. We highlight the importance of equilibrium credit quality inference from borrowers' endogenous sign-up decisions. When data sharing triggers privacy concerns by facilitating exploitative targeted loans, the equilibrium sign-up population can grow with the degree of privacy concerns.
28118.zh_abstract: 开放银行促进了由生成数据的客户同意的数据共享，其监管目标是促进传统银行与挑战者金融科技新进入者之间的竞争。我们研究了当共享银行的客户数据使金融科技贷款人能够更好地筛选或瞄准借款人时，贷款市场的竞争。开放银行可能使整个金融行业受益，却让所有借款人境况更糟，即使借款人可以选择是否共享其数据。我们强调了借款人内生注册决策中均衡信用质量推断的重要性。当数据共享通过促进剥削性的定向贷款引发隐私担忧时，均衡注册人口可能随着隐私担忧程度的增加而增长。
28118.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE, ME, PR；JEL：D18, G21, L13, L15, L51

28117.title: Fiscal Policy in Europe: A Helicopter View
28117.zh_title: 欧洲财政政策：直升机视角
28117.authors: Florin O. Bilbiie, Tommaso Monacelli, Roberto Perotti
28117.abstract: We discuss the main fiscal policy issues in the Eurozone. Our goal is pedagogical: we do not make any new proposal, but try to represent fairly the various sides of the debate. We focus on two issues that are at the core of the current debate. The first is that, right from the start, the government deficit and debt were the key objects of contention in the debate that led to the creation of the Eurozone - and they still are, although the reasons have changed. The second, obvious issue is that a currency union implies the loss of a country-specific instrument, a national monetary policy. This puts a higher burden on fiscal policy as a tool to counteract shocks., a burden that might be even heavier now that the European Central Bank has arguably reached the Zero Lower Bound. Two obvious solutions are mutual insurance between countries; and a centralized stabilization policy. Yet both have been remarkably difficult to come by. We argue that the main reason is fear of persistent, unidirectional transfers between countries, an issue that largely reflects a Northern vs. Southern Europe divide.
28117.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了欧元区的主要财政政策问题。我们的目标是教学性的：我们不提出任何新建议，而是试图公平地呈现辩论的各个方面。我们聚焦于当前辩论核心的两个问题。第一个问题是，从一开始，政府赤字和债务就是导致欧元区创建的辩论中的关键争论点——现在仍然如此，尽管原因已经改变。第二个显而易见的问题是，货币联盟意味着失去一个特定国家的工具，即国家货币政策。这使得财政政策作为应对冲击的工具承担了更重的负担，在欧洲央行可能已达到零下限的情况下，这一负担可能更加沉重。两个显而易见的解决方案是国家间的相互保险和集中化的稳定政策。然而，这两者都极难实现。我们认为，主要原因是对国家间持续、单向转移的恐惧，这个问题在很大程度上反映了南欧与北欧的分歧。
28117.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E62, E63, F45

28116.title: The Effects of Incentivizing Early Prenatal Care on Infant Health
28116.zh_title: 激励早期产前护理对婴儿健康的影响
28116.abstract: We investigated the effects of the timing of early prenatal care on infant health by exploiting a reform that required expectant mothers to initiate prenatal care during the first ten weeks of gestation to obtain a one-time monetary transfer paid after childbirth. Applying a difference-in-differences design to individual-level data on the population of births and fetal deaths, we identified small but statistically significant positive effects of the policy on neonatal health. We further provide suggestive evidence that improved maternal health-related knowledge and behaviors during pregnancy are plausible channels through which the reform might have affected fetal health.
28116.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用一项改革来研究早期产前护理时机对婴儿健康的影响，该改革要求孕妇在妊娠前10周内开始产前护理，以获得产后支付的一次性货币转移。通过对出生和胎儿死亡人口个体层面数据应用双重差分设计，我们识别出该政策对新生儿健康具有微小但统计上显著的正向效应。我们进一步提供了提示性证据，表明孕期母亲健康相关知识和行为的改善是改革可能影响胎儿健康的合理渠道。

28115.title: De-Globalisation? Global Value Chains in the Post-COVID-19 Age
28115.zh_title: 去全球化？后COVID-19时代的全球价值链
28115.abstract: This paper evaluates the extent to which the world economy has entered a phase of de-globalisation, and it offers some speculative thoughts on the future of global value chains in the post-COVID-19 age. Although the growth of international trade flows relative to that of GDP has slowed down since the Great Recession, this paper finds little systematic evidence indicating that the world economy has already entered an era of de-globalisation. Instead, the observed slowdown in globalisation is a natural sequel to the unsustainable increase in globalisation experienced in the late 1980s, 1990s and early 2000s. I offer a description of the mechanisms leading to that earlier expansionary phase, together with a discussion of why these forces might have run out of steam, and of the extent to which they may be reversible. I conclude that the main challenge for the future of globalisation is institutional and political in nature rather than technological, although new technologies might aggravate the trends in inequality that have created the current political backlash against globalisation. Zooming in on the COVID-19 global pandemic, I similarly conclude that the current health crisis may further darken the future of globalisation if it aggravates policy tensions across countries.
28115.zh_abstract: 本文评估了世界经济进入去全球化阶段的程度，并对后COVID-19时代全球价值链的未来提出了一些推测性思考。尽管自大衰退以来，国际贸易流量相对于GDP的增长已经放缓，但本文发现几乎没有系统性证据表明世界经济已进入去全球化时代。相反，观察到的全球化放缓是20世纪80年代末、90年代和21世纪初经历的不可持续的全球化增长的自然结果。我描述了导致早期扩张阶段的机制，讨论了这些力量为何可能已经耗尽，以及它们在多大程度上是可逆的。我的结论是，全球化未来面临的主要挑战本质上是制度性和政治性的，而非技术性的，尽管新技术可能会加剧导致当前对全球化政治反弹的不平等趋势。聚焦于COVID-19全球大流行，我同样得出结论，如果当前的健康危机加剧国家间的政策紧张，它可能进一步使全球化的未来黯淡。
28115.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F1, F2, F4, F5, F6

28114.title: Indirect Costs of Government Aid and Intermediary Supply Effects: Lessons From the Paycheck Protection Program
28114.zh_title: 政府援助的间接成本与中介供给效应：来自薪资保护计划的教训
28114.authors: Tetyana Balyuk, Nagpurnanand R. Prabhala, Manju Puri
28114.abstract: The $\$669$ billion Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) provides highly subsidized financing to small businesses. The PPP is a positive shock in financing supply to the small, highly constrained publicly listed firms in our sample and has average positive treatment effects. Yet, uptake is not universal. In fact, several firms return PPP funds before use, and curiously, experience positive valuation effects when they do so. These firms desire and the markets value the release from government oversight even if it means giving up cheap funding. The PPP is also a demand shock to the banks making PPP loans. Intermediary supply effects shape PPP delivery. Larger borrowers enjoy earlier PPP access, an effect that is more pronounced in big banks. The results have implications for policy design, the costs of being public, and bank-firm relationships.
28114.zh_abstract: 6690亿美元的薪资保护计划（PPP）为小企业提供高度补贴的融资。PPP对我们样本中规模较小、高度受限的上市公司来说是一个融资供给的正向冲击，并具有平均正向处理效应。然而，参与并非普遍。事实上，几家公司在使用前就退还了PPP资金，并且奇怪的是，它们在这样做时经历了正向的估值效应。这些公司渴望且市场重视摆脱政府监管，即使这意味着放弃廉价融资。PPP也是对发放PPP贷款的银行的需求冲击。中介供给效应塑造了PPP的交付。较大的借款人享有更早的PPP准入，这种效应在大型银行中更为明显。这些结果对政策设计、上市成本以及银行-企业关系具有启示意义。
28114.meta: Programs：CF, ME, PE；JEL：E61, G32, G38, H81

28113.title: LATE for History
28113.zh_title: 历史中的局部平均处理效应
28113.abstract: In Historical Economics, Persistence studies document the persistence of some historical phenomenon or leverage this persistence to identify causal relationships of interest in the present. In this chapter, we analyze the implications of allowing for heterogeneous treatment effects in these studies. We delineate their common empirical structure, argue that heterogeneous treatment effects are likely in their context, and propose minimal abstract models that help interpret results and guide the development of empirical strategies to uncover the mechanisms generating the effects.
28113.zh_abstract: 在历史经济学中，持续性研究记录了某些历史现象的持续性，或利用这种持续性来识别当前感兴趣的因果关系。在本章中，我们分析了在这些研究中允许异质性处理效应的含义。我们描绘了它们共同的实证结构，论证了异质性处理效应在其背景下是可能的，并提出了最小抽象模型，以帮助解释结果并指导开发揭示产生这些效应的机制的实证策略。

28112.title: Revenge of the Experts: Will Covid-19 Renew or Diminish Public Trust in Science?
28112.zh_title: 专家的复仇：COVID-19会重振还是削弱公众对科学的信任？
28112.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Orkun Saka
28112.abstract: It is sometimes said that an effect of the COVID-19 pandemic will be heightened appreciation of the importance of scientific research and expertise. We test this hypothesis by examining how exposure to previous epidemics affected trust in science and scientists. Building on the “impressionable years hypothesis” that attitudes are durably formed during the ages 18 to 25, we focus on individuals exposed to epidemics in their country of residence at this particular stage of the life course. Combining data from a 2018 Wellcome Trust survey of more than 75,000 individuals in 138 countries with data on global epidemics since 1970, we show that such exposure has no impact on views of science as an endeavor but that it significantly reduces trust in scientists and in the benefits of their work. We also illustrate that the decline in trust is driven by the individuals with little previous training in science subjects. Finally, our evidence suggests that epidemic-induced distrust translates into lower compliance with health-related policies in the form of negative views towards vaccines and lower rates of child vaccination.
28112.zh_abstract: 有时人们认为，COVID-19大流行的一个影响将是提高对科学研究和专业知识重要性的认识。我们通过考察以往流行病暴露如何影响对科学和科学家的信任来检验这一假设。基于“印象形成年龄假说”，即态度在18至25岁期间会持久形成，我们重点关注在生命这一特定阶段在其居住国暴露于流行病的个体。结合2018年威康信托基金对138个国家超过75,000名个体的调查数据以及1970年以来的全球流行病数据，我们表明这种暴露对将科学视为一项事业的观点没有影响，但显著降低了对科学家及其工作益处的信任。我们还说明，信任的下降是由先前在科学学科方面训练较少的个体驱动的。最后，我们的证据表明，流行病引发的信任缺失会转化为对健康相关政策的较低遵从度，表现为对疫苗的负面看法和较低的儿童疫苗接种率。

28111.title: The Inexorable Recoveries of Unemployment
28111.zh_title: 失业的不可阻挡的复苏
28111.abstract: Unemployment recoveries in the US have been inexorable. Between 1948 and 2019, the annual reduction in the unemployment rate during cyclical recoveries was fairly tightly distributed around 0.1 log points per year. The economy seems to have an irresistible force toward restoring full employment. In the aftermath of a recession, unless another crisis intervenes, unemployment continues to glide down. Occasionally, unemployment rises rapidly during an economic crisis, while most of the time, unemployment declines slowly and smoothly at a near-constant proportional rate. We show that similar properties hold for other measures of the US unemployment rate and for the unemployment rates of many other emerging and advanced countries.
28111.zh_abstract: 美国的失业复苏一直是不可阻挡的。在1948年至2019年间，周期性复苏期间失业率的年度下降相当紧密地分布在每年约0.1个对数点附近。经济似乎有一种不可抗拒的力量趋向于恢复充分就业。在经济衰退之后，除非发生另一场危机，失业率会持续下降。偶尔，失业率在经济危机期间迅速上升，而大多数时候，失业率以近乎恒定的比例缓慢而平稳地下降。我们表明，类似的特性也适用于美国失业率的其他衡量指标以及许多其他新兴和发达国家的失业率。

28110.title: Why Is All COVID-19 News Bad News?
28110.zh_title: 为什么所有COVID-19新闻都是坏消息？
28110.authors: Bruce Sacerdote, Ranjan Sehgal, Molly Cook
28110.abstract: We analyze the tone of COVID-19 related English-language news articles written since January 1, 2020. Ninety one percent of stories by U.S. major media outlets are negative in tone versus fifty four percent for non-U.S. major sources and sixty five percent for scientific journals. The negativity of the U.S. major media is notable even in areas with positive scientific developments including school re-openings and vaccine trials. Media negativity is unresponsive to changing trends in new COVID-19 cases or the political leanings of the audience. U.S. major media readers strongly prefer negative stories about COVID-19, and negative stories in general. Stories of increasing COVID-19 cases outnumber stories of decreasing cases by a factor of 5.5 even during periods when new cases are declining. Among U.S. major media outlets, stories discussing President Donald Trump and hydroxychloroquine are more numerous than all stories combined that cover companies and individual researchers working on COVID-19 vaccines.
28110.zh_abstract: 我们分析了自2020年1月1日以来撰写的与COVID-19相关的英语新闻文章的语气。美国主要媒体91%的故事语气负面，而非美国主要来源为54%，科学期刊为65%。即使在包括学校重新开放和疫苗试验在内的积极科学进展领域，美国主要媒体的负面性也值得注意。媒体负面性对新COVID-19病例的变化趋势或受众的政治倾向没有反应。美国主要媒体读者强烈偏好关于COVID-19的负面故事，以及一般的负面故事。即使在新增病例下降期间，关于病例增加的故事数量也是关于病例减少的故事数量的5.5倍。在美国主要媒体中，讨论唐纳德·特朗普总统和羟氯喹的故事数量超过了所有涵盖从事COVID-19疫苗研究的公司和个体研究人员的故事总和。

28109.title: Has Persistence Persisted in Private Equity? Evidence from Buyout and Venture Capital Funds
28109.zh_title: 私募股权中的持续性是否依然存在？来自并购基金和风险投资基金的新证据
28109.authors: Robert S. Harris, Tim Jenkinson, Steven N. Kaplan, Ruediger Stucke
28109.abstract: We present new evidence on the persistence of U.S. private equity (buyout and venture capital) funds using cash-flow data sourced from Burgiss’s large sample of institutional investors. Previous research, studying largely pre-2000 data, finds strong persistence for both buyout and venture capital (VC) firms. Using ex post or most recent fund performance (as of June2019), we confirm the previous findings on persistence overall as well as for pre-2001 and post-2000 funds. However, when we look at the information an investor would actually have – previous fund performance at the time of fundraising rather than final performance – we find little or no evidence of persistence for buyouts, both overall and post-2000. For post-2000 buyouts, the conventional wisdom to invest in previously top quartile funds does not hold. Using previous fund PME at fundraising, we find modest persistence, but it is driven by bottom, not top quartile performance. On the other hand, persistence for VC funds persists even when using information available at the time of fundraising. Therefore, the conventional wisdom of investors holds for VC.
28109.zh_abstract: 我们利用Burgiss大型机构投资者样本中的现金流数据，提供了关于美国私募股权（并购基金和风险投资基金）持续性的新证据。以往研究主要基于2000年之前的数据，发现并购基金和风险投资公司均表现出强烈的持续性。当我们使用事后或截至2019年6月的最新基金业绩时，我们确认了以往关于整体持续性以及2000年前后基金持续性的发现。然而，当我们考察投资者实际可获得的信息——即募资时的过往基金业绩而非最终业绩时，我们发现并购基金几乎没有或完全没有持续性的证据，无论是整体还是2000年之后。对于2000年后的并购基金，投资于此前排名前四分之一的基金的传统智慧并不成立。使用募资时的过往基金PME，我们发现了适度的持续性，但这主要是由底部四分之一的业绩驱动，而非顶部四分之一。另一方面，即使使用募资时可获得的信息，风险投资基金的持续性依然存在。因此，投资者的传统智慧对风险投资仍然适用。

28108.title: Will the Secular Decline In Exchange Rate and Inflation Volatility Survive COVID-19?
28108.zh_title: 汇率和通胀波动的长期下降趋势能否在新冠疫情后幸存？
28108.authors: Ethan Ilzetzki, Carmen M. Reinhart, Kenneth S. Rogoff
28108.abstract: Over the 21st century, and especially since 2014, global exchange rate volatility has been trending downwards, notably among the core G3 currencies (dollar, euro and the yen), and to some extent the G4 (including China). This stability continued through the Covid-19 recession to date: unusual, as exchange volatility generally rises in US recessions. Compared to measures of stock price volatility, exchange rate volatility rivals the lows reached in the heyday of Bretton Woods I. This paper argues that the core driver is convergence in monetary policy, reflected in a sharp-reduction of inflation and short- and especially long-term interest rate differentials. This unprecedented stability, which partially extends to emerging markets, is strongly reinforced by expectations that the zero bound will be significantly binding for advanced economies for years to come. We consider various hypotheses and suggest that the shutdown of monetary volatility is the leading explanation. The concluding part of the paper cautions that systemic economic crises often produce major turning points, so a collapse of the Extended Bretton Woods II regime cannot be ruled out.
28108.zh_abstract: 进入21世纪，特别是自2014年以来，全球汇率波动性呈下降趋势，尤其是在核心G3货币（美元、欧元和日元）之间，并在一定程度上扩展到G4（包括中国）。这种稳定性一直持续到新冠疫情衰退期间至今：这很不寻常，因为汇率波动性通常在美国经济衰退期间上升。与股票价格波动性指标相比，汇率波动性已接近布雷顿森林体系I鼎盛时期的低点。本文认为，核心驱动因素是货币政策的趋同，这反映在通胀率以及短期尤其是长期利差的急剧缩小上。这种前所未有的稳定性，部分延伸至新兴市场，并因预期零利率下限将在未来数年对发达经济体构成显著约束而得到强烈强化。我们考虑了各种假说，并认为货币波动性的消失是主要的解释。论文的结论部分警告说，系统性经济危机往往会产生重大转折点，因此，扩展的布雷顿森林体系II的崩溃不能被排除。

28107.title: Top-up Design and Health Care Expenditure: Evidence from Cardiac Stents
28107.zh_title: 补差设计与医疗支出：来自心脏支架的证据
28107.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Hsienming Lien, Xuezhen Tao
28107.abstract: Since 2006, Taiwan's National Health Insurance (NHI) has covered the full cost of baseline treatment in cardiac stents (bare-metal stents, BMS). Still, it requires patients to pay the incremental cost of more expensive treatments (drug-eluting stents, DES). Within this “top- up” design, we study how hospitals responded to a 26% cut of the NHI reimbursement rate in 2009. We find that hospitals that were more revenue reliant on cardiac patients increased BMS usage per stent patient by 0.05 or 6% but not DES usage. In addition, while the average of DES prices remains almost unchanged, minor teaching hospitals that were more revenue reliant on cardiac patients raised the DES price by 12.6%, and therefore could recoup at most 32.7% of the revenue loss from the NHI rate cut in 2009-2010. Overall, the rate cut was effective in reducing NHI expenditure without any substantial changes in patient outcomes, although some minor teaching hospitals made moral hazard adjustments in response.
28107.zh_abstract: 自2006年以来，台湾全民健康保险（NHI）覆盖了心脏支架基线治疗（裸金属支架，BMS）的全部费用，但仍要求患者支付更昂贵治疗（药物洗脱支架，DES）的增量成本。在这种“补差”设计下，我们研究了医院如何应对2009年NHI报销率下调26%的情况。我们发现，更依赖心脏病患者收入的医院，每位支架患者的BMS使用量增加了0.05个或6%，但DES使用量没有增加。此外，虽然DES的平均价格几乎保持不变，但更依赖心脏病患者收入的次要教学医院将DES价格提高了12.6%，因此可以在2009-2010年间最多弥补因NHI降费造成的32.7%的收入损失。总体而言，降费有效地减少了NHI支出，且未对患者结局产生实质性改变，尽管一些次要教学医院做出了道德风险调整作为应对。

28106.title: The Comparative Impact of Cash Transfers and a Psychotherapy Program on Psychological and Economic Well-being
28106.zh_title: 现金转移支付与心理治疗项目对心理和经济福祉的比较影响
28106.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Robert Mudida, Jeremy P. Shapiro
28106.abstract: We study the economic and psychological effects of a USD 1076 PPP unconditional cash transfer, a five-week psychotherapy program, and the combination of both interventions among 5,756 individuals in rural Kenya. One year after the interventions, cash transfer recipients had higher consumption, asset holdings, and revenue, as well as higher levels of psychological well-being than control households. In contrast, the psychotherapy program had no measurable effects on either psychological or economic outcomes, both for individuals with poor mental health at baseline and others. The effects of the combined treatment are similar to those of the cash transfer alone.
28106.zh_abstract: 我们研究了肯尼亚农村地区5756名个体中，一笔1076美元购买力平价的无条件现金转移支付、一个为期五周的心理治疗项目以及两者联合干预的经济和心理效应。干预一年后，与对照组家庭相比，现金转移支付接受者在消费、资产持有和收入方面更高，同时心理福祉水平也更高。相比之下，心理治疗项目对心理或经济结果均无显著影响，无论是对基线时心理健康状况较差的个体还是其他个体。联合治疗的效果与单独现金转移支付的效果相似。

28105.title: Beyond 140 Characters: Introduction to The Role of Innovation and Entrepreneurship in Economic Growth
28105.zh_title: 超越140个字符：创新与创业在经济增长中的作用导论
28105.authors: Michael J. Andrews, Aaron Chatterji, Scott Stern
28105.abstract: This is an introduction to the forthcoming volume "The Role of Innovation and Entrepreneurship in Economic Growth." The chapters collected in this volume seek to answer the following questions: What is the relationship between innovation/entrepreneurship and economic growth in specific industrial sectors? How has the relationship between innovation /entrepreneurship and economic growth changed over time? How much do policies, programs, and specialized institutions meant to encourage innovation or entrepreneurship ultimately spur economic growth? Does innovation or entrepreneurship affect economic performance and social progress other than through measured productivity and economic growth, and if so, how can these effects be measured? We synthesize the chapters in this volume and present broad conclusions.
28105.zh_abstract: 这是对即将出版的《创新与创业在经济增长中的作用》一书的导论。本书收集的章节旨在回答以下问题：在特定产业部门中，创新/创业与经济增长之间的关系是什么？创新/创业与经济增长之间的关系如何随时间变化？旨在鼓励创新或创业的政策、项目和专门机构在多大程度上最终刺激了经济增长？除了通过衡量的生产率和经济增长之外，创新或创业是否还影响经济表现和社会进步？如果是，这些影响如何衡量？我们综合了本书各章节的内容，并提出了广泛的结论。

28157.title: The Children of HOPE VI Demolitions: National Evidence on Labor Market Outcomes
28157.zh_title: HOPE VI 拆除项目的儿童：关于劳动力市场结果的全国性证据
28157.authors: John C. Haltiwanger, Mark J. Kutzbach, Giordano E. Palloni, Henry Pollakowski, Matthew Staiger, Daniel Weinberg
28157.abstract: We combine national administrative data on earnings and participation in subsidized housing to study how the demolition of 160 public housing projects—funded by the HOPE VI program—affected the adult labor market outcomes for 18,500 children. Our empirical strategy compares children exposed to the program to children drawn from thousands of non-demolished projects, adjusting for observable differences using a flexible estimator that combines features of matching and regression. We find that children who resided in HOPE VI projects earn 14% more at age 26 relative to children in comparable non-HOPE VI projects. These earnings gains are strongest for demolitions in large cities, particularly in neighborhoods with higher pre-demolition poverty rates and lower pre-demolition job accessibility. There is no evidence that the labor market gains are driven by improvements in household or neighborhood environments that promote human capital development in children. Rather, subsequent improvements in job accessibility represent a likely pathway for the results.
28157.zh_abstract: 我们结合了关于收入与补贴住房参与的全国行政数据，研究了由 HOPE VI 计划资助的 160 个公共住房项目的拆除如何影响 18,500 名儿童的成年劳动力市场结果。我们的实证策略将接触该计划的儿童与来自数千个未拆除项目的儿童进行比较，并使用一种结合匹配和回归特征的灵活估计器来调整可观测差异。我们发现，与居住在可比非 HOPE VI 项目中的儿童相比，居住在 HOPE VI 项目中的儿童在 26 岁时的收入高出 14%。这些收入增长在大型城市中最为显著，尤其是在拆除前贫困率较高且拆除前就业可达性较低的社区。没有证据表明劳动力市场的改善是由促进儿童人力资本发展的家庭或社区环境改善所驱动的。相反，随后就业可达性的改善是这些结果的一个可能途径。

28156.title: ESG Preference, Institutional Trading, and Stock Return Patterns
28156.zh_title: ESG 偏好、机构交易与股票回报模式
28156.authors: Jie Cao, Sheridan Titman, Xintong Zhan, Weiming Zhang
28156.abstract: Socially responsible (SR) institutions tend to focus more on the ESG performance and less on quantitative signals of value. Consistent with this difference in focus, we find that SR institutions react less to quantitative mispricing signals. Our evidence suggests that the increased focus on ESG may have influenced stock return patterns. Specifically, abnormal returns associated with these mispricing signals are greater for stocks held more by SR institutions. The link between SR ownership and the efficacy of mispricing signals only emerges in recent years with the rise of ESG investing, and is significant only when there are arbitrage-related funding constraints.
28156.zh_abstract: 社会责任型机构往往更关注 ESG 表现，而较少关注价值的量化信号。与这种关注差异一致，我们发现社会责任型机构对量化错误定价信号的反应较弱。我们的证据表明，对 ESG 日益增长的关注可能影响了股票回报模式。具体来说，与这些错误定价信号相关的异常回报在那些被社会责任型机构持有更多的股票中更大。社会责任型所有权与错误定价信号有效性之间的联系仅在近年来随着 ESG 投资的兴起才出现，并且仅在存在与套利相关的资金约束时才显著。

28155.title: How Does Cost-Sharing Impact Spending Growth and Cost-Effective Treatments? Evidence from Deductibles
28155.zh_title: 成本分摊如何影响支出增长和成本效益治疗？来自免赔额的证据
28155.authors: Claudio Lucarelli, Molly Frean, Aliza S. Gordon, Lynn M. Hua, Mark Pauly
28155.abstract: The growth of health care spending has been a longstanding policy concern. Over the years, several innovations have been proposed to lower levels of health care spending; however, their impact has been limited and not sustained over time. Costly new technology, while often an improvement to existing care, has been identified as a principal driver of health care spending growth. Recent literature has shown that high deductible health plans (HDHP) can have an immediate impact on levels of health care spending, but their medium- and long-run effects on spending growth remain unknown. In this paper, we use multiple-employer-group claims data from a large national insurer to (i) study whether HDHPs reduce the growth in spending over four years compared to lower deductible alternatives; and (ii) explore the mechanisms behind any reductions in growth by looking at whether HDHPs reduce the use of low- vs. high-value treatments. We find that HDHPs have a limited effect on spending growth, with a statistically significant reduction observed only for prescription drugs. HDHPs are not associated with significantly lower growth in spending on highly cost-effective medicines in a sample of drugs but do reduce spending growth for less cost-effective drugs.
28155.zh_abstract: 医疗保健支出的增长一直是一个长期的政策关注点。多年来，提出了若干创新措施以降低医疗保健支出水平；然而，它们的影响有限且未能持续。昂贵的新技术，虽然通常是对现有护理的改进，但已被确定为医疗保健支出增长的主要驱动因素。近期文献表明，高免赔额健康计划可以对医疗保健支出水平产生即时影响，但其对支出增长的中长期影响仍然未知。在本文中，我们使用来自一家大型全国保险公司的多雇主群体索赔数据，来（i）研究高免赔额健康计划是否能在四年内降低支出增长，与较低免赔额的替代方案相比；以及（ii）通过考察高免赔额健康计划是否减少了对低价值与高价值治疗的使用，来探索任何增长减缓背后的机制。我们发现，高免赔额健康计划对支出增长的影响有限，仅在处方药方面观察到统计上显著的减少。在一个药物样本中，高免赔额健康计划与高成本效益药物的支出增长显著降低无关，但确实减少了成本效益较低药物的支出增长。

28154.title: Black and White: Access to Capital among Minority-Owned Startups
28154.zh_title: 黑与白：少数族裔初创企业的资本获取
28154.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Alicia Robb, David T. Robinson
28154.abstract: We use confidential and restricted-access data from the Kauffman Firm Survey and matched administrative data on credit scores to explore racial disparities in access to capital for new business ventures. The novel results on racial inequality in startup financing indicate that black-owned startups start smaller and stay smaller over the entire first eight years of their existence. Black startups face more difficulty in raising external capital, especially external debt. We find that disparities in credit-worthiness constrain black entreprenuers, but perceptions of treatment by banks also hold them back. Black entrepreneurs apply for loans less often than white entrepreneurs largely because they expect to be denied credit, even when they have a good credit history and in settings where strong local banks favor new business development.
28154.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自考夫曼企业调查的保密和限制访问数据，以及匹配的信用评分行政数据，来探讨新创企业在资本获取方面的种族差异。关于初创企业融资中种族不平等的新颖结果表明，黑人拥有的初创企业起步规模较小，并且在成立后的整个前八年内保持较小规模。黑人初创企业在筹集外部资本方面面临更大困难，尤其是外部债务。我们发现，信用价值的差异限制了黑人企业家，但对银行对待方式的看法也阻碍了他们。黑人企业家申请贷款的频率低于白人企业家，很大程度上是因为他们预期会被拒绝信贷，即使他们拥有良好的信用记录，并且在当地强势银行有利于新业务发展的环境中也是如此。

28153.title: Employer Neighborhoods and Racial Discrimination
28153.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Sonja B. Starr
28153.abstract: Using a large field experiment, we show that racial composition of employer neighborhoods predicts employment discrimination patterns in a direction suggesting in-group bias. Our data also show racial disparities in the geographic distribution of job postings. Simulations illustrate how these patterns combine to shape disparities. When jobs are located far from Black neighborhoods, Black applicants are doubly disadvantaged: discrimination patterns disfavor them, and they have fewer nearby opportunities. Finally, building on prior work on Ban-the-Box laws, we show that employers in less Black neighborhoods appear much likelier to stereotype Black applicants as potentially criminal when they lack criminal record information.
28153.zh_abstract: 通过一项大规模的实地实验，我们表明雇主社区的种族构成预测了就业歧视模式，其方向表明存在内群体偏见。我们的数据还显示了招聘信息地理分布上的种族差异。模拟说明了这些模式如何共同形成差异。当工作地点远离黑人社区时，黑人申请者面临双重劣势：歧视模式对他们不利，而且他们附近的就业机会更少。最后，基于先前关于“禁止询问犯罪记录”法律的研究，我们表明，在黑人较少的社区，当雇主缺乏犯罪记录信息时，他们似乎更有可能将黑人申请者刻板地视为潜在的罪犯。

28152.title: Lockdowns and Innovation: Evidence from the 1918 Flu Pandemic
28152.zh_title: 封锁与创新：来自1918年流感大流行的证据
28152.authors: Enrico Berkes, Olivier Deschenes, Ruben Gaetani, Jeffrey Lin, Christopher Severen
28152.abstract: Does social distancing harm innovation? We estimate the effect of non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs)—policies that restrict interactions in an attempt to slow the spread of disease—on local invention. We construct a panel of issued patents and NPIs adopted by 50 large US cities during the 1918 flu pandemic. Difference-in-differences estimates show that cities adopting longer NPIs did not experience a decline in patenting during the pandemic relative to short-NPI cities, and recorded higher patenting afterward. Rather than reduce local invention by restricting localized knowledge spillovers, NPIs adopted during the pandemic may have better preserved other inventive factors.
28152.zh_abstract: 社交距离会损害创新吗？我们估计了非药物干预措施——即旨在减缓疾病传播而限制互动的政策——对本地发明的影响。我们构建了一个包含1918年流感大流行期间美国50个大城市所采用的非药物干预措施和已授权专利的面板数据。双重差分估计表明，与采用较短非药物干预措施的城市相比，采用较长非药物干预措施的城市在大流行期间并未经历专利数量的下降，并且在之后记录了更高的专利数量。大流行期间采用的非药物干预措施可能并非通过限制本地化知识溢出而减少本地发明，而是更好地保留了其他发明因素。

28151.title: Revenue Collapses and the Consumption of Small Business Owners in the Early Stages of the COVID-19 Pandemic
28151.zh_title: 收入崩溃与COVID-19大流行早期阶段小企业主的消费
28151.authors: Olivia S. Kim, Jonathan A. Parker, Antoinette Schoar
28151.abstract: Using financial account data linking small businesses to their owner households, we examine how business owners’ consumption responded to changes in business revenues during the COVID-19 crisis. In the first two months following the National Emergency, business revenues declined by 40 percent, largely driven by national factors rather than local infection rates or policies. However, the pass-through of revenue losses to owner consumption was limited: each dollar of revenue loss resulted in only a 1.6-cent decline in consumption. This muted pass-through persisted through 2021, even after the introduction of COVID-19 vaccines. Our findings suggest that federal subsidies and pandemic-induced reductions in spending opportunities explain the limited impact.
28151.zh_abstract: 利用将小企业与其所有者家庭联系起来的金融账户数据，我们研究了在COVID-19危机期间，企业主的消费如何响应企业收入的变化。在国家紧急状态宣布后的头两个月，企业收入下降了40%，这主要是由全国性因素而非当地感染率或政策驱动的。然而，收入损失向所有者消费的传导是有限的：每损失1美元收入仅导致1.6美分的消费下降。这种微弱的传导持续到2021年，即使在COVID-19疫苗推出之后也是如此。我们的发现表明，联邦补贴以及大流行导致的支出机会减少解释了这种有限的影响。
28151.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PE, PR；JEL：D12, D15, D25, E2, E63, E65, G32, G5

28150.title: Taxing Our Wealth
28150.abstract: This paper evaluates proposals for an annual wealth tax. While a dozen OECD countries levied wealth taxes in the recent past, now only three retain them, with only Switzerland raising a comparable fraction of revenue as recent proposals for a US wealth tax. Studies of these taxes sometimes, but not always, find a substantial behavioral response, including of saving, portfolio change, avoidance, and evasion, and the impact depends crucially on design features, especially the broadness of the base and enforcement provisions. Because the US proposals are very different from any previous wealth tax, experience in other countries offers only broad lessons, but we can gain insights from closely related taxes, such as the property and the estate tax, and from optimal tax analysis of the role of wealth taxation.
28150.zh_abstract: 本文评估了年度财富税的提案。尽管有十几个经合组织国家在近期征收过财富税，但现在只有三个国家保留它们，其中只有瑞士征收的财政收入比例与近期美国财富税提案相当。对这些税收的研究有时（但并非总是）发现显著的行为反应，包括储蓄、投资组合变化、避税和逃税，其影响关键取决于设计特征，尤其是税基的广泛性和执行条款。由于美国的提案与以往任何财富税都截然不同，其他国家的经验仅提供宽泛的教训，但我们可以从密切相关的税收（如财产税和遗产税）以及关于财富税作用的最优税收分析中获得见解。

28149.title: Production Networks and International Fiscal Spillovers
28149.zh_title: 生产网络与国际财政溢出效应
28149.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Karine Gente, Changhua Yu
28149.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of ﬁscal spending shocks in a dynamic, multi-country model with international production networks. We ﬁrst derive a decomposition of the eﬀects of a ﬁscal spending shock on the GDP of any country. This decomposition deﬁnes the response as the sum of a Direct, Income, and Price eﬀect. The Direct Eﬀect depends only on structural parameters and is independent of assumptions about monetary policy, wage setting, or capital mobility, while the Price Eﬀect is zero in the aggregate across countries. We apply this decomposition to an analysis of ﬁscal spillovers in the Eurozone, using the production network structure from the World Input Output Database (WIOD). We ﬁnd that ﬁscal spillovers from Germany and some other large Eurozone countries may be large, and within the range of empirical estimates. Without international production network linkages, spillovers would be only a third as large as predicted by the baseline model. Finally, we explore the diﬀusion of identiﬁed government spending shocks at the sectoral level, both within and across countries, using an empirical measure of the response, based on the theoretical decomposition. The empirical estimates are strongly consistent with the theoretical model.
28149.zh_abstract: 本文在一个包含国际生产网络的动态多国模型中分析了财政支出冲击的影响。我们首先推导出财政支出冲击对任何国家GDP影响的分解。该分解将响应定义为直接效应、收入效应和价格效应之和。直接效应仅取决于结构参数，且独立于关于货币政策、工资设定或资本流动性的假设，而价格效应在各国加总后为零。我们将此分解应用于欧元区财政溢出效应的分析，使用了世界投入产出数据库（WIOD）中的生产网络结构。我们发现，来自德国及其他一些大型欧元区国家的财政溢出效应可能很大，且处于经验估计的范围内。如果没有国际生产网络联系，溢出效应将仅为基线模型预测的三分之一。最后，我们基于理论分解，使用响应的经验度量，在部门层面探索了已识别的政府支出冲击在国内和国家间的扩散。经验估计与理论模型高度一致。

28148.title: All Aboard: The Effects of Port Development
28148.zh_title: 全体登船：港口发展的影响
28148.authors: César Ducruet, Réka Juhász, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Claudia Steinwender
28148.abstract: Seaports facilitate the fast flow of goods across space, but ports also entail local costs borne by host cities. We use the introduction of containerized shipping to explore the effects of port development. At the local level, we find that seaport development increases city population by making a city more attractive, but this market access effect is offset by costs which make the city less attractive. At the aggregate level, we find that the local costs associated with port development are heterogeneous across cities and reduce aggregate welfare gains, which however are still positive and substantial.
28148.zh_abstract: 海港促进了商品在空间上的快速流动，但港口也会给东道城市带来本地成本。我们利用集装箱化运输的引入来探讨港口发展的影响。在地方层面，我们发现海港发展通过使城市更具吸引力而增加了城市人口，但这种市场准入效应被使城市吸引力下降的成本所抵消。在总体层面，我们发现与港口发展相关的本地成本在城市间存在异质性，并减少了总体福利收益，然而这些收益仍然是正向且显著的。

28147.title: Reconciling the Conflicting Narratives on Poverty in China
28147.zh_title: 调和关于中国贫困的相互矛盾的叙述
28147.abstract: The widely held view that China has greatly reduced income poverty over the last 40 years does not accord with all the evidence. The paper tries to reconcile the conflicting findings. The fact that strongly-relative measures show rising poverty is easily understood, since such measures depend solely on relative distribution, and inequality in China has been rising until recently. More surprising, and revealing, is the story told by the official lines, which were revised twice since the original 1985 line. The paper shows that the official lines are neither absolute nor strongly relative. Rather, they are weakly relative, with a positive elasticity to the mean that is less than unity. Along with rising inequality, this feature slowed the pace of measured poverty reduction when compared to absolute measures. Nonetheless, substantial progress against poverty is indicated, as we confirm using our independent, and higher, weakly-relative lines calibrated to cross-country data.
28147.zh_abstract: 普遍认为中国在过去40年中大幅减少了收入贫困的观点并非与所有证据相符。本文试图调和这些相互矛盾的发现。强相对指标显示贫困上升这一事实很容易理解，因为此类指标仅取决于相对分布，而中国的不平等程度直到最近一直在上升。更令人惊讶且具有揭示性的是官方贫困线的故事，这些贫困线自1985年最初设定以来已修订过两次。本文表明，官方贫困线既非绝对也非强相对。相反，它们是弱相对的，与均值之间存在小于1的正弹性。与不平等上升一起，这一特征与绝对指标相比减缓了所测贫困减少的速度。尽管如此，正如我们使用基于跨国数据校准的独立且更高的弱相对贫困线所确认的那样，贫困方面取得了显著进展。

28146.title: The HOLC Maps: How Race and Poverty Influenced Real Estate Professionals’ Evaluation of Lending Risk in the 1930s
28146.zh_title: HOLC地图：1930年代种族与贫困如何影响房地产专业人士对贷款风险的评估
28146.authors: Price V. Fishback, Jessica LaVoice, Allison Shertzer, Randall Walsh
28146.abstract: During the late 1930s, the Home Owners’ Loan Corporation (HOLC) developed a series of area descriptions with color-coded maps of cities that summarized mortgage lending risk. We provide evidence that these maps were not the primary source used by the FHA to create their “redlining” maps for insuring mortgages. Instead, the HOLC maps provide a unique snapshot of how real estate professionals perceived lending risk in the 1930s. These perceptions were shaped by a wide range of factors including race, income, and housing quality. We use the maps to explore the mechanisms behind the prevalence of black residents in the lowest-rated neighborhoods. Our results suggest that racial bias in the construction of the HOLC maps can explain at most 4 to 20 percent of the observed concentration of black households in the lowest-rated zones. Instead, our results suggest that the majority of black households were located in such zones because decades of disadvantage and discrimination had already pushed them into the core of economically distressed neighborhoods prior to the federal government’s involvement in mortgage markets.
28146.zh_abstract: 在1930年代末，房主贷款公司（HOLC）制定了一系列区域描述，并附有彩色编码的城市地图，总结了抵押贷款风险。我们提供证据表明，这些地图并非联邦住房管理局（FHA）创建其抵押贷款保险“红线”地图的主要来源。相反，HOLC地图提供了房地产专业人士在1930年代如何看待贷款风险的独特快照。这些看法受到包括种族、收入和住房质量在内的广泛因素的影响。我们利用这些地图来探讨黑人居民在评级最低社区中普遍存在的机制。我们的结果表明，HOLC地图构建中的种族偏见最多只能解释观察到的黑人家庭在最低评级区域集中度的4%至20%。相反，我们的结果表明，大多数黑人家庭位于此类区域，是因为在联邦政府介入抵押贷款市场之前，数十年的劣势和歧视已经将他们推向了经济困难社区的核心。

28145.title: On the Effects of the Availability of Means of Payments: The Case of Uber
28145.zh_title: 论支付方式可用性的影响：以优步为例
28145.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David O. Argente
28145.abstract: We use three quasi-natural experiments in Mexico and one in Panama to estimate the effects of having the option to pay with cash on Uber rides. The ability to pay in cash affects the demand for rides, which is reflected in large changes in the total number of trips, fares, miles, and number of users after Uber introduced cash payments, particularly in lower-income city blocks. On the other hand, the effects on prices, estimated times of arrival, and competitor pricing are negligible, consistent with the supply of trips being very elastic. Although cash payments naturally increase the fraction of users that pay exclusively with cash, more than half of the users have access to both cards and cash, and alternate between payment methods. We find evidence consistent with cash and card payments being imperfectly substitutable at both the intensive and extensive margins, which magnifies the impact of policies that restrict the availability of payment methods.
28145.zh_abstract: 我们利用墨西哥的三个准自然实验和巴拿马的一个准自然实验来估计在优步行程中拥有现金支付选项的影响。现金支付能力影响了对行程的需求，这反映在优步引入现金支付后总行程次数、车费、里程和用户数量的巨大变化中，尤其是在低收入城市街区。另一方面，对价格、预计到达时间和竞争对手定价的影响可以忽略不计，这与行程供给具有高度弹性的情况一致。尽管现金支付自然增加了仅使用现金支付的用户比例，但超过一半的用户同时拥有银行卡和现金，并在支付方式之间切换。我们发现的证据与现金和银行卡支付在集约边际和广延边际上均不完全可替代的观点一致，这放大了限制支付方式可用性政策的影响。

28144.title: The U-shape of Happiness in Scotland
28144.zh_title: 苏格兰幸福感的U型曲线
28144.authors: David N.F. Bell, David G. Blanchflower
28144.abstract: We examine well-being in Scotland using micro data from the Scottish Health Survey and the UK Annual Population Surveys. We find evidence of a midlife low in Scotland in well-being at around age fifty using a variety of measures of both happiness and unhappiness. We confirm that higher consumption of fruit and vegetables is associated with higher levels of happiness in Scotland. We compare this with evidence for England from the Health Survey of England. The decline in well-being between youth and midlife is comparable in size to the loss of a spouse or of a job and around half of the fall in well-being in the COVID-19 lockdown. We also find a mid-life peak in suicides in Scotland. Despite higher mortality and suicide rates in Scotland than in England, paradoxically we find that the Scots are happier than the English. Northern Ireland is the happiest of the four home countries. We also find evidence of U-shapes in England, Wales and Northern Ireland in the mid to late forties.
28144.zh_abstract: 我们利用苏格兰健康调查和英国年度人口调查的微观数据考察了苏格兰的幸福感。我们使用多种衡量幸福和不幸福的指标，发现苏格兰在50岁左右存在中年幸福感低谷的证据。我们确认，在苏格兰，较高的水果和蔬菜消费与较高的幸福感水平相关。我们将此与英格兰健康调查中英格兰的证据进行了比较。青年期至中年期幸福感的下降幅度与失去配偶或失业相当，约为新冠疫情封锁期间幸福感下降幅度的一半。我们还发现苏格兰的自杀率在中年达到峰值。尽管苏格兰的死亡率和自杀率高于英格兰，但矛盾的是，我们发现苏格兰人比英格兰人更幸福。北爱尔兰是四个本土国家中最幸福的。我们还发现英格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰在45至49岁左右存在U型曲线的证据。

28143.title: Happiness and Aging in the United States
28143.abstract: We examine the relationship between union membership and job satisfaction over the life-course using data from the National Child Development Study (NCDS) tracking all those born in Great Britain in a single week in March in 1958 through to age 55 (2013). Data from immigrants as well as non-respondents to the original 1958 Perinatal Mortality Study (PMS) are added in later years. Conditioning on one’s social class at birth, together with one’s education and employment status, we find there is a significant negative correlation between union membership and job satisfaction that is apparent across the life-course. Lagged union membership status going back many years is negatively correlated with current job satisfaction, though its effects become statistically non-significant when conditioning on current union membership status. These results provide a different perspective to longitudinal studies showing short-term positive responses to switches in membership status. They are consistent with earlier work showing that this cohort of workers, and others before them, have persistently lower job satisfaction as union members compared to their non-union counterparts.
28143.zh_abstract: 我们利用国家儿童发展研究（NCDS）的数据，考察了工会会员身份与工作满意度在整个生命周期中的关系。该研究追踪了1958年3月某一周内出生的所有英国人，直至其55岁（2013年）。在后续年份中，加入了移民以及1958年围产期死亡率研究（PMS）原始受访者之外的数据。在控制了出生时的社会阶层、教育程度和就业状况后，我们发现工会会员身份与工作满意度之间存在显著的负相关关系，这种关系在整个生命周期中都很明显。多年前的滞后工会会员身份与当前工作满意度呈负相关，但在控制当前工会会员身份后，其影响在统计上变得不显著。这些结果为显示会员身份转换带来短期积极反应的纵向研究提供了不同的视角。它们与早期研究一致，表明这一工人群体及其之前的群体，作为工会会员，其工作满意度持续低于非工会会员。

28142.title: The Economic Consequences of Sir Robert Peel: A Quantitative Assessment of the Repeal of the Corn Laws
28142.zh_title: 罗伯特·皮尔爵士的经济后果：废除《谷物法》的定量评估
28142.authors: Douglas A. Irwin, Maksym G. Chepeliev
28142.abstract: This paper provides a quantitative general equilibrium evaluation of the repeal of Britain’s Corn Laws in 1846, the signature trade policy event of the nineteenth century. In studying the impact of abolishing the import duty on wheat, our framework highlights (a) the large open economy impact on the country’s terms of trade and (b) the distribution impact on the factor earnings and the expenditure patterns of two different income groups. Based on a detailed input-output matrix of the British economy in 1841, our model suggests that the repeal left Britain’s overall welfare roughly unchanged as the static efficiency gains are offset by the adverse terms-of-trade effects. Laborers and capital owners gained a slight amount at the expense of landowners (whose income fell about 3-5 percent). Combining these changes in factor payments with the different consumption patterns across income groups, we find that the top 10 percent of income earners lose while the bottom 90 percent of income earners, who spent a disproportionate amount of their income on food, gain.
28142.zh_abstract: 本文对1846年英国废除《谷物法》（19世纪标志性的贸易政策事件）进行了定量的一般均衡评估。在研究取消小麦进口关税的影响时，我们的框架强调了（a）对一国贸易条件的大型开放经济影响，以及（b）对两个不同收入群体的要素收入和支出模式的分配影响。基于1841年英国经济的详细投入产出矩阵，我们的模型表明，废除《谷物法》使英国的总体福利大致保持不变，因为静态效率收益被不利的贸易条件效应所抵消。劳动者和资本所有者获得了少量收益，但以土地所有者的损失为代价（其收入下降了约3-5%）。将这些要素支付的变化与不同收入群体的不同消费模式相结合，我们发现收入最高的10%的人受损，而收入最低的90%的人（他们将不成比例的收入用于食品）受益。

28141.title: Earnings Dynamics and Intergenerational Transmission of Skill
28141.zh_title: 收入动态与技能的代际传递
28141.abstract:
This paper develops and estimates a two-factor model of intergenerational skill transmission when earnings inequality reflects differences in individual skills and other non-skill shocks. We consider heterogeneity in both initial skills and skill growth rates, allowing variation in skill growth to change over the lifecycle. Using administrative tax data on two linked generations of Canadians covering 37 years, we exploit covariances in log earnings (at different ages) both across and within generations to identify and estimate the intergenerational correlation structure for initial skills and skill growth rates, lifecycle skill growth profiles, and the dynamics of non-skill earnings shocks.
We estimate low intergenerational elasticities (IGEs) for earnings in Canada (less than 0.2, even when based on 5- and 9-year average earnings); however, skill IGEs are typically 2-3 times larger due to considerable (and persistent) variation in earnings conditional on skills. Both earnings and skill IGEs decline substantially for more recent cohorts and are lower for children born to younger fathers.
We estimate significant heterogeneity in both initial skills and skill growth rates, showing that intergenerational transmission of these factors explains up to 40% of children's skill variation. Skills become a more important determinant of earnings over the first part of workers' careers, while intergenerational transmission of skills becomes less important with age. Although "inherited" initial skills (compared to skill growth) are a more important determinant of children's skills throughout their lives, parents' initial skills and skill growth rates are equally important determinants of children's skills, largely because both strongly influence children's initial skills.
Finally, we study intergenerational mobility for the 35 largest cities in Canada, determining the extent to which considerable differences in earnings and skill IGEs vary with the extent of local heterogeneity in parental skills vs. earnings instability.
28141.zh_abstract: 本文构建并估计了一个两因子模型，用于分析当收入不平等反映个体技能差异及其他非技能冲击时，技能的代际传递。我们考虑了初始技能和技能增长率的异质性，并允许技能增长的变化在生命周期中发生改变。利用覆盖37年的两代加拿大关联行政税收数据，我们通过跨代和代内不同年龄对数收入的协方差，识别并估计了初始技能和技能增长率的代际相关结构、生命周期技能增长曲线以及非技能收入冲击的动态。我们估计加拿大收入的代际弹性较低（低于0.2，即使基于5年和9年平均收入）；然而，由于技能条件收入存在显著且持续的变异，技能代际弹性通常高出2-3倍。对于较近期的队列，收入和技能代际弹性均大幅下降，且父亲较年轻时出生的子女弹性更低。我们估计初始技能和技能增长率均存在显著异质性，表明这些因素的代际传递解释了子女技能变异的40%。在职业生涯早期，技能成为收入更重要的决定因素，而技能的代际传递随年龄增长变得不那么重要。尽管“继承的”初始技能（相对于技能增长）是子女一生技能更重要的决定因素，但父母的初始技能和技能增长率对子女技能的影响同等重要，这主要是因为两者都强烈影响子女的初始技能。最后，我们研究了美国35个最大城市的代际流动性，确定了收入和技能代际弹性的显著差异在多大程度上随当地父母技能异质性与收入不稳定性程度而变化。

28140.title: Inference on Risk Premia in Continuous-Time Asset Pricing Models
28140.zh_title: 连续时间资产定价模型中风险溢价的推断
28140.authors: Yacine Aït-Sahalia, Jean Jacod, Dacheng Xiu
28140.abstract: We develop and implement asymptotic theory to conduct inference on continuous-time asset pricing models using individual equity returns sampled at high frequencies over an increasing time horizon. We study the identification and estimation of risk premia for the continuous and jump components of risks. Our results generalize the Fama-MacBeth two-pass regression approach from the classical discrete-time factor setting to a continuous-time factor model with general dynamics for the factors, idiosyncratic components and factor loadings, while accounting for the fact that the inputs of the second-pass regression are themselves estimated in the first pass.
