28140.zh_abstract: 我们开发并实施了渐近理论，利用在递增时间跨度内以高频采样的个股收益率，对连续时间资产定价模型进行推断。我们研究了风险连续部分和跳跃部分的风险溢价的识别与估计。我们的结果将经典离散时间因子设定下的Fama-MacBeth两阶段回归方法推广到连续时间因子模型，该模型包含因子、特质成分和因子载荷的一般动态，同时考虑了第二阶段回归的输入本身是在第一阶段估计的这一事实。

28139.title: Mandated and Voluntary Social Distancing During The COVID-19 Epidemic: A Review
28139.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的强制与自愿社交距离：综述
28139.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
28139.abstract: For much of 2020, the COVID-19 epidemic upended social and economic life globally. In an effort to reduce COVID-19 risks in the U.S., state and local governments issued many recommendations and regulations to induce social distancing, adding to voluntary reductions in interpersonal contact. The responses to the epidemic helped contain spread, but also lead to high unintended societal costs. In the summer months, states took steps to revive the economy and lift social distancing regulations. However, as many epidemiologists expected, the scale of the epidemic has expanded very rapidly in the fall. In the week of October 14, the US generated around 57,000 new COVID-19 cases and 700 deaths each day. By November 15, the country was generating about 151,000 new cases and 1,200 deaths per day. These rapid increases in cases and deaths raise concerns about the capacity of local healthcare systems around the country. State governments are once again facing difficult choices about whether and how to use policies to address the spread of the virus. The incoming Biden-Harris administration faces an important challenge in trying to manage the epidemic as well as a large scale vaccination campaign. Although the epidemic is less than a year old, it has generated a huge volume of research by economists, epidemiologists, and others. This body of work may help inform policy decisions facing society in the coming months.\nIn this paper, we make five broad contributions. First, we provide a concise review of economic and social science research on mobility patterns, labor market outcomes, consumer behavior, and population health during the first phase of the epidemic. Second, we sketch a simple microeconomic model that may be useful considering the determinants of social distancing and the role of different policy instruments in promoting distancing. Third, we present a simple typology of the policies that were used at the state and county levels during the closure and re-opening phases of the epidemic in the U.S.. Fourth, we review a collection of new data sources that have played an important role in monitoring and analyzing population behavior this year. Fifth, we present results from event study regressions that try to disentangle private vs. policy-induced changes in mobility patterns during the early part of the epidemic.
28139.zh_abstract: 在2020年的大部分时间里，COVID-19疫情颠覆了全球的社会和经济生活。为降低美国的COVID-19风险，州和地方政府发布了大量建议和规定以诱导社交距离，这加剧了人际接触的自愿减少。对疫情的反应有助于控制传播，但也导致了高昂的非预期社会成本。夏季，各州采取措施重振经济并解除社交距离规定。然而，正如许多流行病学家所预期，秋季疫情规模迅速扩大。截至10月14日当周，美国每天新增约57,000例COVID-19病例和700例死亡。到11月15日，该国每天新增约151,000例病例和1,200例死亡。病例和死亡的快速增加引发了对全国各地地方医疗系统能力的担忧。州政府再次面临艰难选择，即是否以及如何使用政策来应对病毒传播。即将上任的拜登-哈里斯政府在管理疫情以及大规模疫苗接种运动方面面临重大挑战。尽管疫情发生不到一年，但已产生了经济学家、流行病学家和其他学者的大量研究。这些工作可能有助于为未来几个月社会面临的政策决策提供信息。本文做出五项主要贡献。第一，我们简要回顾了疫情第一阶段关于流动性模式、劳动力市场结果、消费者行为和人口健康的经济学和社会科学研究。第二，我们勾勒了一个简单的微观经济模型，该模型可能有助于考虑社交距离的决定因素以及不同政策工具在促进社交距离中的作用。第三，我们提出了一个简单的政策类型学，涵盖了美国疫情关闭和重新开放阶段在州和县层面使用的政策。第四，我们回顾了一系列新的数据来源，这些来源在今年监测和分析人口行为方面发挥了重要作用。第五，我们展示了事件研究回归的结果，试图在疫情早期区分流动性模式变化的私人因素与政策诱导因素。

28138.title: We are all Behavioral, More or Less: A Taxonomy of Consumer Decision Making
28138.zh_title: 我们或多或少都是行为性的：消费者决策的分类学
28138.abstract: We examine how 17 behavioral biases relate to each other, to other decision inputs, and to decision outputs. Most consumers exhibit multiple biases in our nationally representative panel data. There is substantial heterogeneity across consumers, even within similar demographic/skill groups. Biases are positively correlated within person, especially after adjusting for measurement error, and less correlated with other inputs—risk aversion, patience, cognitive skills, and personality traits—with some expected exceptions. Accounting for this correlation structure, we reduce our 29 decision inputs to eight common factors. Seven common factors load on at least two biases, six on clusters of theoretically related biases, and two or three are distinctly behavioral. All but one common factor is distinct from cognitive skills. Factor scores strongly conditionally correlate with decisions and outcomes in various domains. We discuss several potential implications of this taxonomy for various approaches to modeling influences of behavioral biases on decision making.
28138.zh_abstract: 我们研究了17种行为偏差如何相互关联，以及它们与其他决策输入和决策输出的关系。在我们的全国代表性面板数据中，大多数消费者表现出多种偏差。即使在相似的人口统计/技能群体内，消费者之间也存在显著的异质性。偏差在个体内呈正相关，尤其是在调整测量误差后，并且与其他输入（风险厌恶、耐心、认知技能和人格特质）的相关性较低，但存在一些预期的例外。考虑到这种相关结构，我们将29个决策输入缩减为八个共同因子。七个共同因子至少负载于两种偏差，六个负载于理论上相关的偏差集群，两到三个明显是行为性的。除一个共同因子外，所有因子都与认知技能不同。因子得分与各领域的决策和结果在条件上高度相关。我们讨论了这种分类学对多种建模行为偏差对决策制定影响方法的若干潜在启示。
28138.meta: Programs：AG, DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE；JEL：C36, C81, D90, E70

28137.title: Mediating Conflict in the Lab
28137.authors: Alessandra Casella, Evan Friedman, Manuel Perez Archila
28137.abstract: Mechanism design teaches us that a mediator can strictly improve the chances of peace between two opponents even when the mediator has no independent resources, is less informed than the two parties, and has no enforcement power. We test the theory in a lab experiment where two subjects negotiate how to share a resource; in case of conflict, the subjects' privately known strength determines their payoffs. The subjects send cheap talk messages about their strength to one another (in the treatment with direct communication) or to the mediator (in the mediation treatment), before making their demands or receiving the mediator's recommendations. We find that, in line with the theory, messages are significantly more sincere when sent to the mediator. However, contrary to the theory, peaceful resolution is not more frequent, even when the mediator is a computer implementing the optimal mediation program. While the theoretical result refers to the best (i.e. most peaceful) equilibrium under mediation, multiple equilibria exist, and the best equilibrium is particularly vulnerable to small deviations from full truthfulness. Subjects are not erratic and their deviations induce only small losses in payoffs, and yet they translate into significant increases in conflict.
28137.zh_abstract: 机制设计理论告诉我们，即使调解人没有独立资源、信息少于双方且没有执行权力，调解人也能严格改善双方之间和平的机会。我们在实验室实验中检验了这一理论，其中两名受试者就如何分享资源进行谈判；在冲突情况下，受试者私下知晓的实力决定了他们的收益。受试者在提出要求或接受调解人建议之前，向对方（在直接沟通处理中）或调解人（在调解处理中）发送关于其实力的廉价谈话信息。我们发现，与理论一致，当信息发送给调解人时，信息显著更真诚。然而，与理论相反，和平解决并未更频繁地发生，即使调解人是实施最优调解程序的计算机。虽然理论结果指的是调解下最优（即最和平）的均衡，但存在多重均衡，且最优均衡特别容易受到完全诚实性的微小偏离的影响。受试者并非反复无常，他们的偏离仅导致收益的小幅损失，但这些损失却转化为冲突的显著增加。

28133.title: Consumer Surplus of Alternative Payment Methods: Paying Uber with Cash
28133.zh_title: 替代支付方式的消费者剩余：用现金支付优步
28133.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David O. Argente
28133.abstract: We estimate the private benefits for Uber riders from using alternative payment methods. We focus on Mexico where riders have the option to use cash or credit cards to pay for rides. We use three field experiments involving approximately 400,000 riders to estimate the loss of private benefits for riders if a ban on cash payments is implemented. We find that Uber riders, using cash as means of payment either sometimes or exclusively, suffer an average loss of approximately 50% of their expenditures on trips paid in cash before the ban.
28133.zh_abstract: 我们估算了优步乘客使用替代支付方式的私人收益。我们聚焦于墨西哥，那里的乘客可以选择用现金或信用卡支付车费。我们通过三项涉及约40万名乘客的实地实验，估算了如果实施现金支付禁令，乘客私人收益的损失。我们发现，无论是偶尔还是完全使用现金支付车费的优步乘客，在禁令实施前，他们用现金支付的车费支出平均损失约为50%。

28182.title: Stay-at-Home Orders in a Fiscal Union
28182.abstract: State and local governments throughout the United States attempted to mitigate the spread of Covid-19 using stay-at-home orders to limit social interactions and mobility. We study the economic impact of these orders and their optimal implementation in a fiscal union. Using an event study framework, we find that stay-at-home orders caused a 4 percentage point decrease in consumer spending and hours worked. These estimates suggest a $\$10$ billion decrease in spending and $\$15$ billion in lost earnings. We then develop an economic SIR model with multiple locations to study the optimal implementation of stay-at-home orders. From a national welfare perspective, the model suggests that it is optimal for locations with higher infection rates to set stricter mitigation policies. This occurs as a common, national policy is too restrictive for the economies of mildly infected areas and causes greater declines in consumption and hours worked than are optimal.
28182.zh_abstract: 美国各州和地方政府试图通过居家令来限制社交互动和人员流动，以减缓新冠疫情的传播。我们研究了这些命令的经济影响及其在财政联盟中的最优实施。使用事件研究框架，我们发现居家令导致消费者支出和工作时间减少了4个百分点。这些估计表明支出减少了100亿美元，收入损失了150亿美元。然后，我们开发了一个包含多个地点的经济SIR模型，以研究居家令的最优实施。从国家福利的角度来看，该模型表明，感染率较高的地点设定更严格的缓解政策是最优的。这是因为统一的全国性政策对轻度感染地区的经济来说过于严格，导致消费和工作时间的下降幅度超过了最优水平。
28182.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM, PE；JEL：E3, E47, E62, H12, H23, H7

28181.title: Urban Mortality and the Repeal of Federal Prohibition
28181.zh_title: 城市死亡率与联邦禁酒令的废除
28181.authors: David S. Jacks, Krishna Pendakur, Hitoshi Shigeoka
28181.abstract: Federal prohibition was one of the most ambitious policy interventions in US history. However, the removal of restrictions on alcohol after 1933 was not uniform. Using a new balanced panel on annual deaths, we find that city-level repeal is associated with a 11.6% decrease in the rate of death by non-automobile accidents, a category which critically include accidental poisonings. We relate this finding to a large literature which emphasizes – but never precisely quantifies – the mortality effects of adulterated alcohol during federal prohibition. Thus, repeal likely led to a large annual reduction in accidental poisonings. However, combined with previous results showing even larger increases in infant mortality, repeal nonetheless likely had negative contemporaneous effects on public health.
28181.zh_abstract: 联邦禁酒令是美国历史上最雄心勃勃的政策干预之一。然而，1933年后对酒精限制的解除并不统一。利用一个新的年度死亡人数平衡面板数据，我们发现城市层面的禁酒令废除与非机动车事故（其中关键包括意外中毒）死亡率下降11.6%相关。我们将这一发现与大量强调联邦禁酒令期间掺假酒精死亡率影响（但从未精确量化）的文献联系起来。因此，废除禁酒令很可能导致意外中毒人数每年大幅减少。然而，结合先前显示婴儿死亡率增幅更大的结果，废除禁酒令仍然可能对公共健康产生了负面的同期影响。

28180.title: The Effect of Computer-Assisted Learning on Students' Long-Term Development
28180.zh_title: 计算机辅助学习对学生长期发展的影响
28180.authors: Nicola Bianchi, Yi Lu, Hong Song
28180.abstract: In this paper, we examine the effect of computer-assisted learning on students’ long-term development. We explore the implementation of the “largest ed-tech intervention in the world to date,” which connected China’s best teachers to more than 100 million rural students through satellite internet. We find evidence that exposure to the program improved students’ academic achievement, labor performance, and computer usage. We observe these effects up to ten years after program implementation. These findings indicate that education technology can have long-lasting positive effects on a variety of outcomes and can be effective in reducing the rural–urban education gap.
28180.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们研究了计算机辅助学习对学生长期发展的影响。我们探讨了“迄今为止世界上最大的教育技术干预”的实施情况，该干预通过卫星互联网将中国最优秀的教师与超过1亿的农村学生连接起来。我们发现证据表明，接触该计划提高了学生的学业成绩、劳动表现和计算机使用能力。我们在计划实施后长达十年的时间里观察到了这些影响。这些发现表明，教育技术可以对各种结果产生持久的积极影响，并能有效缩小城乡教育差距。
28180.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I24, I26, I28, O15, O38

28179.title: The Impact of Organizational Boundaries on Healthcare Coordination and Utilization
28179.zh_title: 组织边界对医疗协调与利用的影响
28179.authors: Leila Agha, Keith Marzilli Ericson, Xiaoxi Zhao
28179.abstract: We measure organizational concentration—the distribution of a patient's healthcare across organizations—to examine how firm boundaries affect healthcare efficiency. First, when patients move to regions where outpatient visits are typically concentrated within a small set of firms, their healthcare utilization falls. Second, for patients whose PCPs exit the market, switching to a PCP with 1 standard deviation higher organizational concentration reduces utilization by 21%. This finding is robust to controlling for the spread of healthcare across providers. Increases in organizational concentration predict improvements in diabetes care and are not associated with greater use of emergency department or inpatient care.
28179.zh_abstract: 我们衡量组织集中度——患者医疗在组织间的分布——以考察企业边界如何影响医疗效率。首先，当患者迁移到门诊就诊通常集中在一小部分企业的地区时，他们的医疗利用率会下降。其次，对于其初级保健医生退出市场的患者，转向组织集中度高出1个标准差的初级保健医生会使医疗利用率降低21%。这一发现在控制医疗在提供者之间的分散程度后依然稳健。组织集中度的提高预示着糖尿病护理的改善，并且与急诊或住院护理使用率的增加无关。
28179.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D23, I11, L14

28178.title: Dynamical Structure and Spectral Properties of Input-Output Networks
28178.zh_title: 投入产出网络的动力学结构与谱性质
28178.abstract: We associate a dynamical system with input-output networks and study its spectral properties. Specifically, we develop a dynamic production network model featuring adjustment costs of changing inputs and thus gradual recovery from temporary TFP shocks. First, we explicitly solve for the output and welfare effects of temporary shocks. We show shocks to sectors that generate significant sales through distant linkages to the consumer are most damaging. Second, we eigendecompose the input-output matrix and show, because higher-order linkages take longer to recover, fewer eigenvectors are needed to represent the welfare impact of sectoral shocks in the dynamic economy compared to the Domar weights. Third, we analyze the U.S. input-output structure and show the welfare impact of temporary shocks has a low-dimensional, 4-factor structure (out of 171 eigenvectors). Finally, we revisit the historical use of input-output analysis in target selection for bombing Nazi Germany and Imperial Japan during WWII.
28178.zh_abstract: 我们将一个动力系统与投入产出网络相关联，并研究其谱性质。具体来说，我们开发了一个动态生产网络模型，该模型具有调整投入成本的特征，因此能从暂时的全要素生产率冲击中逐渐恢复。首先，我们明确求解了暂时冲击对产出和福利的影响。我们表明，对通过远距离联系向消费者产生显著销售的部门造成的冲击最具破坏性。其次，我们对投入产出矩阵进行特征分解，并表明，由于高阶联系需要更长时间恢复，在动态经济中，表示部门冲击福利影响所需的特征向量比Domar权重更少。第三，我们分析了美国的投入产出结构，并表明暂时冲击的福利影响具有低维度的4因子结构（在171个特征向量中）。最后，我们重新审视了历史上在二战期间对纳粹德国和日本帝国进行轰炸目标选择时投入产出分析的使用。

28177.title: GDP, Wellbeing, and Health: Thoughts on the 2017 Round of the International Comparison Program
28177.zh_title: GDP、福祉与健康：对2017年国际比较计划轮次的思考
28177.abstract: In March 2020, the International Comparison Project published its latest results, for the calendar year 2017. This round presents common-unit or purchasing-power-parity data for 137 countries on Gross Domestic Product and its components. We review a number of important issues, what is new, what is not new, and what the new data can and cannot do. Of great importance is the lack of news, that the results are broadly in line with earlier results from 2011. We consider the relationship between national accounts measures and health, particularly in light of the COVID-19 epidemic which may reduce global inequality, even as it increases inequality within countries. We emphasize things that GDP cannot do, some familiar—like its silence on distribution—and some less familiar—including its increasing detachment from national material wellbeing in a globalized world where international transfers of capital and property rights can have enormous effects on GDP, such as the 26 percent increase in Ireland’s GDP in 2015.
28177.zh_abstract: 2020年3月，国际比较项目发布了其最新结果，涵盖2017日历年度。本轮提供了137个国家国内生产总值及其组成部分的共同单位或购买力平价数据。我们回顾了若干重要问题：哪些是新的，哪些不是新的，以及新数据能做什么和不能做什么。一个非常重要的方面是缺乏新意，即结果与2011年的早期结果大致一致。我们考虑了国民账户衡量指标与健康之间的关系，特别是考虑到COVID-19疫情，该疫情可能减少全球不平等，即使它加剧了国家内部的不平等。我们强调了GDP无法做到的事情，有些是熟悉的——比如它对分配的沉默——有些则不太熟悉——包括在一个全球化的世界中，GDP与国家物质福祉的日益脱节，因为资本和产权的国际转移可能对GDP产生巨大影响，例如2015年爱尔兰GDP增长了26%。
28177.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, EH, IFM；JEL：E01, F10, F62, I15, I31, P22, Y1

28176.title: Divided We Fall: International Health and Trade Coordination During a Pandemic
28176.zh_title: 分裂则衰：疫情期间的国际卫生与贸易协调
28176.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Ernst-Ludwig von Thadden
28176.abstract: We analyze the role of international trade and health coordination in times of a pandemic by building a two-economy, two-good trade model integrated into a micro-founded SIR model of infection dynamics. Uncoordinated governments with national mandates can adopt (i) containment policies to suppress infection spread domestically, and (ii) (import) tariffs to prevent infection coming from abroad. The efficient, i.e., coordinated, risk-sharing arrangement dynamically adjusts both policy instruments to share infection and economic risks internationally. However, in Nash equilibrium, uncoordinated trade policies robustly feature inefficiently high tariffs that peak with the pandemic in the foreign economy. This distorts terms of trade dynamics and magnifies the welfare costs of tariff wars during a pandemic due to lower levels of consumption and production as well as smaller gains via diversification of infection curves across economies.
28176.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个融入微观基础感染动态SIR模型的两经济体、两商品贸易模型，分析了疫情期间国际贸易与卫生协调的作用。拥有国家授权的非协调政府可以采取（i）遏制政策以抑制国内感染传播，以及（ii）（进口）关税以防止来自国外的感染。有效的、即协调的风险分担安排会动态调整这两种政策工具，以在国际上分担感染和经济风险。然而，在纳什均衡中，非协调的贸易政策稳健地表现为效率低下的高关税，其峰值出现在外国经济疫情高峰期。这扭曲了贸易条件动态，并因消费和生产水平降低以及跨经济体感染曲线多样化带来的收益减少，放大了疫情期间关税战的福利成本。
28176.meta: Programs：EH, IFM, ITI, PE；JEL：F1, F4, H87, I1

28175.title: The Distributional Effects of Student Loan Forgiveness
28175.zh_title: 学生贷款减免的分配效应
28175.abstract: We study the distributional consequences of student debt forgiveness in present value terms, accounting for differences in repayment behavior across the earnings distribution. Full or partial forgiveness is regressive because high earners took larger loans, but also because, for low earners, balances greatly overstate present values. Consequently, forgiveness would benefit the top decile as much as the bottom three deciles combined. Blacks and Hispanics would also benefit substantially less than balances suggest. Enrolling households who would benefit from income-driven repayment is the least expensive and most progressive policy we consider.
28175.zh_abstract: 我们研究了学生债务减免在现值方面的分配后果，考虑了不同收入阶层还款行为的差异。全额或部分减免是累退的，因为高收入者获得了更大的贷款，但也因为对于低收入者而言，余额大大高估了现值。因此，减免将使收入最高的十分之一群体受益，其程度相当于收入最低的三个十分之一群体的总和。黑人和西班牙裔的受益程度也远低于余额所暗示的水平。让能从收入驱动还款中受益的家庭加入，是我们考虑的最便宜且最累进的政策。
28175.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D14, G18, G5, G51, H52, H81, J18, J24

28174.title: TFPR: Dispersion and Cyclicality
28174.abstract: This paper studies the determinants of TFPR, a revenue based measure of total factor productivity. Recent business cycle models are built upon the assumption of countercyclical dispersion in TFPR. But, the distribution of TFPR is endogenous, dependent upon exogenous shocks and the endogenous determination of prices. An overlapping generations model with monopolistic competition and state dependent pricing is constructed to study the factors that shape the TFPR distribution. The empirical focus is on three key data patterns: (i) countercyclical dispersion of TFPR , (ii) countercyclical dispersion of price changes and (iii) countercyclical frequency of price adjustment. The analysis uncovers two interesting scenarios in which these moments are matched. One arises in the presence of shocks to the dispersion of TFPQ, a quantity based measure of total factor productivity, along with a negatively correlated change in the mean of TFPQ. The second arises if the monetary authority responds to shocks to the dispersion of TFPQ by “leaning against the wind”. Due to state contingent pricing, the model is nonlinear. Simple correlations mask these nonlinearities of the underlying economy. The real eﬀects of monetary innovations are state dependent, with monetary policy less eﬀective in recessions.
28174.zh_abstract: 本文研究了TFPR（一种基于收入的全要素生产率衡量指标）的决定因素。最近的商业周期模型建立在TFPR离散性呈逆周期性的假设之上。但是，TFPR的分布是内生的，取决于外生冲击和价格的内生决定。我们构建了一个具有垄断竞争和状态依赖定价的代际交叠模型，以研究塑造TFPR分布的因素。实证重点放在三个关键数据模式上：（i）TFPR的逆周期离散性，（ii）价格变化的逆周期离散性，以及（iii）价格调整频率的逆周期性。分析揭示了两种有趣的情景，在这些情景中这些矩得以匹配。一种情景出现在存在TFPQ（一种基于数量的全要素生产率衡量指标）离散性冲击，同时TFPQ均值发生负相关变化的情况下。第二种情景出现在货币当局通过“逆风而行”来应对TFPQ离散性冲击时。由于状态依赖定价，该模型是非线性的。简单相关性掩盖了基础经济的这些非线性特征。货币创新的实际效应是状态依赖的，货币政策在经济衰退时效果较差。

28173.title: Do State Tobacco 21 Laws Work?
28173.zh_title: 州级烟草21岁法案有效吗？
28173.authors: Calvin Bryan, Benjamin Hansen, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
28173.abstract: Tobacco 21 (T-21) laws prohibit the sale of tobacco products to individuals under age 21. This study is the first to comprehensively examine the impacts of statewide T-21 laws on youth tobacco consumption, including spillovers to minor teens. Using data from the 2009-2019 Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance Survey (BRFSS) and a difference-in-differences approach, we find that the enactment of a statewide T-21 law was associated with a 2.5 to 3.9 percentage-point decline in smoking participation among 18-to-20-year-olds. A causal interpretation of our estimates is supported by event-study analyses and falsification tests for young adults ages 21 and older. Next, using data from the 2009-2019 State Youth Risky Behavior Surveys (YRBS), we find that statewide T-21 laws reduced tobacco cigarette and electronic cigarette (e-cigarette) consumption among 18-year-old high school students. However, descriptive evidence suggests that the negative impact of T-21 laws on e-cigarette use among 18-year-olds may be partially blunted by an increase in borrowing e-cigarettes from others. Finally, we find that T-21 laws generate important spillovers including (i) a reduction in tobacco cigarette use among 16-to-17-year-olds, a group that relies heavily on the “social market” — including 18-year-old peers — to access tobacco, and (ii) reductions in both marijuana use and frequency of alcohol consumption among older teenagers.
28173.zh_abstract: 烟草21岁（T-21）法案禁止向21岁以下个人销售烟草产品。本研究首次全面考察了全州范围的T-21法案对青少年烟草消费的影响，包括对未成年青少年的溢出效应。使用2009-2019年行为风险因素监测调查（BRFSS）的数据和双重差分方法，我们发现，全州范围T-21法案的颁布与18至20岁人群吸烟参与率下降2.5至3.9个百分点相关。事件研究分析和针对21岁及以上年轻成年人的安慰剂检验支持了我们估计的因果解释。接下来，使用2009-2019年州青少年危险行为调查（YRBS）的数据，我们发现，全州范围的T-21法案减少了18岁高中学生的传统卷烟和电子烟消费。然而，描述性证据表明，T-21法案对18岁人群电子烟使用的负面影响可能部分被从他人处借用电子烟的增加所削弱。最后，我们发现T-21法案产生了重要的溢出效应，包括（i）减少16至17岁青少年的传统卷烟使用，该群体严重依赖“社交市场”（包括18岁的同龄人）获取烟草，以及（ii）减少较大年龄青少年的大麻使用和饮酒频率。

28172.title: Did COVID-19 Change Life Insurance Offerings?
28172.zh_title: COVID-19是否改变了人寿保险产品？
28172.authors: Timothy F. Harris, Aaron Yelowitz, Charles J. Courtemanche
28172.abstract: The profitability of life insurance offerings is contingent on accurate projections and pricing of mortality risk. The COVID-19 pandemic created significant uncertainty, with dire mortality predictions from early forecasts resulting in widespread government intervention and greater individual precaution that reduced the projected death toll. We analyze how life insurance companies changed pricing and offerings in response to COVID-19 using monthly data on term life insurance policies from Compulife. We estimate event-study models that exploit well-established variation in the COVID-19 mortality rate based on age and underlying health status. Despite the increase in mortality risk and significant uncertainty, we find limited evidence that life insurance companies increased premiums or decreased policy offerings due to COVID-19.
28172.zh_abstract: 人寿保险产品的盈利能力取决于对死亡风险的准确预测和定价。COVID-19疫情造成了巨大的不确定性，早期预测的可怕死亡率预测导致广泛的政府干预和更大的个人预防措施，从而减少了预计的死亡人数。我们使用Compulife的定期寿险保单月度数据，分析了人寿保险公司如何因应COVID-19改变定价和产品供应。我们估计了事件研究模型，利用基于年龄和潜在健康状况的COVID-19死亡率的既定差异。尽管死亡风险增加且存在重大不确定性，我们发现有限的证据表明人寿保险公司因COVID-19提高了保费或减少了保单供应。

28171.title: Natural Barriers and Policy Barriers
28171.abstract: This paper investigates whether "natural" trade barriers of a country due to geography and other factors outside the country's control stimulate more or less policy barriers such as tariffs. Our theory predicts that the politician's relative weight on private benefits over social welfare in a "protection-for-sale" setup depends on these "natural" features. The key mechanism is that a society's willingness to invest in improving institutions that constrain rent-seeking behavior is influenced by the natural barriers. Two types of empirical evidence support the theoretical predictions. First, "natural" barriers beget policy barriers - countries with more "natural" barriers tend to have higher tariffs and more NTBs. Second, liberalization begets liberalization - in response to unilateral trade reforms in China in the early 2000s, those other countries that benefit more from the Chinese liberalization also undertake more liberalization of their own.
28171.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个国家的“自然”贸易壁垒（由地理和其他国家无法控制的因素造成）是刺激更多还是更少的政策壁垒（如关税）。我们的理论预测，在“出售保护”框架中，政治家对私人利益相对于社会福利的权重取决于这些“自然”特征。关键机制在于，一个社会投资于改善约束寻租行为的制度的意愿受到自然壁垒的影响。两类实证证据支持理论预测。首先，“自然”壁垒导致政策壁垒——具有更多“自然”壁垒的国家往往有更高的关税和更多的非关税壁垒。其次，自由化导致自由化——作为对21世纪初中国单边贸易改革的回应，那些从中国自由化中受益更多的其他国家也进行了更多的自身自由化。

28170.title: The Rise of State-Connected Private Owners in China
28170.zh_title: 中国国有关联私人所有者的崛起
28170.authors: Chong-En Bai, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Zheng Michael Song, Xin Wang
28170.abstract: We use administrative registration records with information on the owners of all Chinese firms to document their connections through equity investments. We show that the largest private owners have direct equity ties with state owners, the next largest private owners have equity ties with private owners that themselves have equity ties with state owners, and the smallest private owners do not have any ties with state owners. The network of “state-connected” private owners has expanded over the last two decades. The share of registered capital of “state-connected” private owners increased by almost 20 percentage points between 2000 and 2019.
28170.zh_abstract: 我们使用包含所有中国企业所有者信息的行政登记记录，通过股权投资记录其关联。我们发现，最大的私人所有者与国家所有者有直接的股权联系，次大的私人所有者与那些自身与国家所有者有股权联系的私人所有者有股权联系，而最小的私人所有者与国家所有者没有任何联系。“国有关联”私人所有者的网络在过去二十年中有所扩张。在2000年至2019年间，“国有关联”私人所有者的注册资本份额增加了近20个百分点。
28170.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：E0, F0, O0, P0

28169.title: Labor Market Implications of Education MisMatch
28169.zh_title: 教育错配的劳动力市场影响
28169.abstract: This project studies the impact of education mismatch on labor outcomes. Across our sample of OECD countries, there is evidence of mismatch in educational attainment and labor markets. Labor market outcomes are not independent of education mismatch. Our framework for analysis is a dynamic choice model, focusing on education and training decisions. From the estimation of model parameters, the main factor explaining education mismatch is dispersion across individuals in the perceived value of education. From simulations of lifecycle dynamics and counterfactual experiments, among four key countries, education undermatch in Japan is sustained through labor market mechanisms while in Germany, Italy and the US, education undermatch is largely resolved in that these individuals are eventually employed in skilled jobs. Training plays a key role in these dynamics.
28169.zh_abstract: 本项目研究教育错配对劳动力结果的影响。在我们选取的OECD国家样本中，存在教育程度与劳动力市场错配的证据。劳动力市场结果并非独立于教育错配。我们的分析框架是一个动态选择模型，重点关注教育和培训决策。从模型参数估计来看，解释教育错配的主要因素是个体间对教育感知价值的差异。通过对生命周期动态的模拟和反事实实验，在四个关键国家中，日本的教育不足通过劳动力市场机制得以维持，而在德国、意大利和美国，教育不足在很大程度上得到解决，因为这些个体最终受雇于技能型工作。培训在这些动态过程中发挥着关键作用。

28168.title: Designing Advance Market Commitments for New Vaccines
28168.zh_title: 为新疫苗设计预先市场承诺
28168.authors: Michael Kremer, Jonathan D. Levin, Christopher M. Snyder
28168.abstract: Advance market commitments (AMCs) provide a mechanism to stimulate investment by suppliers of products to low-income countries. In an AMC, donors commit to a fund from which a specified subsidy is paid per unit purchased by low-income countries until the fund is exhausted, strengthening suppliers' incentives to invest in research, development, and capacity. Last decade saw the launch of a $\$1.5$ billion pilot AMC to distribute pneumococcal vaccine to the developing world; in the current pandemic, variations on AMCs are being used to fund Covid-19 vaccines.\nThis paper undertakes the first formal analysis of AMCs. We construct a model in which an altruistic donor negotiates on behalf of a low-income country with a vaccine supplier after the supplier has sunk investments. We use this model to explain the logic of an AMC—as a solution to a hold-up problem—and to analyze alternative design features under various economic conditions (cost uncertainty, supplier competition). A key finding is that optimal AMC design differs markedly depending on where the product is in its development cycle.
28168.zh_abstract: 预先市场承诺（AMC）提供了一种机制，以刺激低收入国家产品供应商的投资。在AMC中，捐助者承诺设立一个基金，低收入国家每购买一单位产品，就从该基金中支付指定补贴，直至基金耗尽，从而增强供应商在研发和产能方面投资的激励。过去十年，一项15亿美元的试点AMC启动，用于向发展中国家分发肺炎球菌疫苗；在当前疫情中，AMC的变体正被用于资助新冠疫苗。本文首次对AMC进行正式分析。我们构建了一个模型，其中利他主义捐助者在供应商沉没投资后，代表低收入国家与疫苗供应商进行谈判。我们利用该模型解释AMC的逻辑——作为解决“敲竹杠”问题的一种方案——并分析在不同经济条件（成本不确定性、供应商竞争）下的替代设计特征。一个关键发现是，最优AMC设计因产品处于其开发周期的不同阶段而显著不同。
28168.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D02, I18, O19, O31

28167.title: Jim Crow in the Saddle: The Expulsion of African American Jockeys from American Racing
28167.zh_title: 马鞍上的吉姆·克劳：非裔美国骑师被逐出美国赛马界
28167.abstract: Between the Civil War and the turn of the nineteenth century there were many prominent African American jockeys. They rode winners in all of the Triple-Crown races. But at the turn of the century they were forced out. This paper uses a new data set on the Triple-Crown races, which includes odds on all of the entrants in all of the races, to explore the causes of the expulsion of African American jockeys. Our conclusion is that although there is some evidence of prejudice by owners and the betting public – for the latter in the Kentucky Derby although not in the other legs of the Triple Crown – historical evidence indicates that the final push came from the White jockeys who were determined to “draw the color line.”
28167.zh_abstract: 在内战至十九世纪末期间，有许多杰出的非裔美国骑师。他们曾骑乘赛马赢得所有三冠王赛事。但在世纪之交，他们被迫退出。本文利用三冠王赛事的新数据集（包含所有赛事中所有参赛马匹的赔率），探讨非裔美国骑师被驱逐的原因。我们的结论是，尽管存在马主和博彩公众偏见的证据——对于后者，在肯塔基德比中有所体现，但在三冠王其他赛事中则不然——历史证据表明，最终的推动力来自决心“划清种族界限”的白人骑师。

28166.title: How Spillovers from Appointment Reminders Improve Health Clinic Efficiency
28166.zh_title: 预约提醒的溢出效应如何提升诊所效率
28166.authors: Claire E. Boone, Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Tadeja Gracner, Josefina Rodriguez
28166.abstract: Missed clinic appointments present a significant burden to health care through disruption of care, inefficient use of staff time and wasted clinical resources. Short message service (SMS) appointment reminders show promise to improve clinics’ management through timely appointment cancellations and efficient re-scheduling, but evidence from large-scale interventions is missing. We study a nationwide SMS appointment reminder program in Chile for chronic disease patients at public primary care clinics. Using longitudinal clinic-level data we find that after two years the program increased clinics’ total number of visits per by 5.1% on average. The program did not change the number of visits by chronic patients eligible to receive the reminder, but it instead increased visits by other patients, ineligible to receive reminders in clinics that adopted the program by 7.4% on average. These results suggest that the appointment reminder systems increased clinics’ ability to care for more patients through timely cancellations and re-scheduling.
28166.zh_abstract: 错过诊所预约通过扰乱护理、低效利用员工时间和浪费临床资源，给医疗保健带来沉重负担。短信（SMS）预约提醒有望通过及时取消预约和高效重新安排来改善诊所管理，但缺乏大规模干预的证据。我们研究了智利针对公立初级保健诊所慢性病患者的全国性短信预约提醒项目。利用纵向诊所层面数据，我们发现项目实施两年后，诊所的总就诊次数平均增加了5.1%。该项目并未改变有资格接收提醒的慢性病患者的就诊次数，反而使实施项目的诊所中其他无资格接收提醒的患者的就诊次数平均增加了7.4%。这些结果表明，预约提醒系统通过及时取消和重新安排，提高了诊所服务更多患者的能力。
28166.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, PR；JEL：I1, I11, I12

28165.title: Estimating Preferences for Neighborhood Amenities Under Imperfect Information
28165.zh_title: 信息不完全下对社区便利设施偏好的估计
28165.abstract: We introduce a generalized neighborhood choice model that allows for heterogeneity in knowledge of local amenities. In reality, people often make decisions about where to live without complete information, which can influence their choices and distort the estimated value of amenities. To mitigate this bias, we construct a latent quality index using panel data from a neighborhood choice program that provided information on rents and same-school networks to graduating students. Our analysis shows that individuals tend to switch to neighborhoods with larger networks and lower rents, and these effects persist even after graduation, influencing their actual residential choices. Our marginal willingness-to-pay estimates indicate that living in a neighborhood with a larger network is worth an additional $\$123$ per month, and not accounting for endogeneity could overestimate this amount by as much as 70%.
28165.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个广义的社区选择模型，该模型允许对当地便利设施知识的异质性。在现实中，人们常常在信息不完全的情况下做出居住决策，这会影响他们的选择并扭曲对便利设施价值的估计。为了减轻这种偏差，我们利用一个社区选择项目的面板数据构建了一个潜在质量指数，该项目向即将毕业的学生提供了关于租金和同校网络的信息。我们的分析表明，个体倾向于转向拥有更大网络和更低租金的社区，这些效应甚至在毕业后仍然持续，影响他们实际的居住选择。我们的边际支付意愿估计表明，居住在一个拥有更大网络的社区价值每月额外123美元，而不考虑内生性可能会高估这一数额高达70%。

28164.title: Gender Identity, Race, and Ethnicity-based Discrimination in Access to Mental Health Care: Evidence from an Audit Correspondence Field Experiment
28164.zh_title: 基于性别认同、种族和族裔的心理健康服务获取歧视：来自审计通信实地实验的证据
28164.authors: Luca Fumarco, Benjamin Harrell, Patrick Button, David Schwegman, E Dils
28164.abstract: Racial, ethnic, and gender minorities face mental health disparities. While mental health care can help, minoritized groups could face discriminatory barriers in accessing it. Discrimination may be particularly pronounced in mental health care because providers have more discretion over accepting patients. Research documents discrimination broadly, including in access to health care, but there is limited empirical research on discrimination in access to mental health care. We provide the first experimental evidence, from a correspondence audit field experiment (“simulated patients” study), of the extent to which transgender and non-binary people, African Americans, and Hispanics face discrimination in access to mental health care appointments. We find significant discrimination against transgender or non-binary African Americans and Hispanics. We do not find evidence of discrimination against White transgender and non-binary prospective patients. We are mostly inconclusive as to if cisgender African Americans or Hispanics face discrimination, except we find evidence of discrimination against cisgender African American women.
28164.zh_abstract: 种族、族裔和性别少数群体面临心理健康差异。虽然心理健康服务可以提供帮助，但少数群体在获取服务时可能面临歧视性障碍。由于医疗服务提供者在接收患者方面拥有更多自由裁量权，歧视在心理健康服务中可能尤为突出。研究记录了广泛的歧视，包括在医疗保健获取方面，但关于心理健康服务获取歧视的实证研究有限。我们通过一项通信审计实地实验（“模拟患者”研究），首次提供了关于跨性别者、非二元性别者、非裔美国人和西班牙裔在获取心理健康服务预约时面临歧视程度的实验证据。我们发现针对跨性别或非二元性别的非裔美国人和西班牙裔存在显著歧视。我们没有发现针对白人跨性别和非二元性别潜在患者的歧视证据。关于顺性别非裔美国人或西班牙裔是否面临歧视，我们的结论大多不确定，但我们发现了针对顺性别非裔美国女性的歧视证据。
28164.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：C93, I11, I14, I18, J15, J16

28163.title: Local Sectoral Specialization in a Warming World
28163.zh_title: 变暖世界中的地方部门专业化
28163.authors: Bruno Conte, Klaus Desmet, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
28163.abstract: This paper quantitatively assesses the world's changing economic geography and sectoral specialization due to global warming. It proposes a two-sector dynamic spatial growth model that incorporates the relation between economic activity, carbon emissions, and temperature. The model is taken to the data at the 1° by 1° resolution for the entire world. Over a 200-year horizon, rising temperatures consistent with emissions under Representative Concentration Pathway 8.5 push people and economic activity northwards to Siberia, Canada, and Scandinavia. Compared to a world without climate change, clusters of agricultural specialization shift from Central Africa, Brazil, and India's Ganges Valley, to Central Asia, parts of China and northern Canada. Equatorial latitudes that lose agriculture specialize more in non-agriculture but, due to their persistently low productivity, lose population. By the year 2200, predicted losses in real GDP and utility are 6% and 15%, respectively. Higher trade costs make adaptation through changes in sectoral specialization more costly, leading to less geographic concentration in agriculture and larger climate-induced migration.
28163.zh_abstract: 本文定量评估了全球变暖导致的世界经济地理和部门专业化的变化。它提出了一个两部门动态空间增长模型，该模型纳入了经济活动、碳排放和温度之间的关系。该模型以全球1°×1°分辨率的数据进行校准。在200年的时间跨度内，与代表性浓度路径8.5下的排放相一致的气温上升，将人口和经济活动向北推向西伯利亚、加拿大和斯堪的纳维亚。与没有气候变化的世界相比，农业专业化集群从中非、巴西和印度恒河河谷转移到中亚、中国部分地区和加拿大北部。失去农业的赤道纬度地区更多地转向非农业专业化，但由于其持续的低生产率，人口减少。到2200年，实际GDP和效用的预测损失分别为6%和15%。更高的贸易成本使得通过改变部门专业化来适应变得更加昂贵，导致农业地理集中度降低和更大的气候引发的移民。
28163.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F18, O13, O41, Q56, R11, R12

28162.title: Why is End-of-Life Spending So High? Evidence from Cancer Patients
28162.zh_title: 临终医疗支出为何如此之高？来自癌症患者的证据
28162.authors: Dan Zeltzer, Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Tzvi Shir, Salomon M. Stemmer, Ran D. Balicer
28162.abstract: The concentration of healthcare spending at the end of life is widely documented but poorly understood. To gain insight, we focus on patients newly diagnosed with cancer. They display the familiar pattern: even among cancer patients with similar initial prognoses, monthly spending in the year post diagnosis is over twice as high for those who die within the year than those who survive. This elevated spending on decedents is almost entirely driven by higher inpatient spending, particularly low-intensity admissions, which rise as the prognosis deteriorates. However, even for patients with very poor prognoses at the time of admission, most low-intensity admissions do not result in death, making it difficult to target spending reductions. We also find that among patients with the same cancer type and initial prognosis, end-of-life spending is substantially more elevated for younger patients compared to older patients, suggesting that treatment decisions are not exclusively present-focused. Taken together, these results provide a richer understanding of the sources of high end-of-life spending, without revealing any natural “remedies.”
28162.zh_abstract: 医疗支出在生命末期的集中现象已被广泛记录，但对其原因知之甚少。为了深入了解，我们聚焦于新诊断的癌症患者。他们呈现出熟悉的模式：即使在初始预后相似的癌症患者中，诊断后一年内死亡者的月均支出是存活者的两倍多。临终者支出的增加几乎完全由更高的住院支出驱动，尤其是低强度入院，随着预后恶化而增加。然而，即使对于入院时预后极差的患者，大多数低强度入院并未导致死亡，这使得针对性地削减支出变得困难。我们还发现，在相同癌症类型和初始预后的患者中，年轻患者的临终支出显著高于老年患者，这表明治疗决策并非完全以当前为导向。综合来看，这些结果提供了对高临终支出来源的更丰富理解，但并未揭示任何自然的“补救措施”。

28161.title: Aggregate Advertising Expenditure in the U.S. Economy: What's Up? Is It Real?
28161.zh_title: 美国经济中的广告总支出：发生了什么变化？这是真实的吗？
28161.abstract: The two components of the advertising industry – the creative sector that develops and produces messages, and the communications sector that transmits messages via various media – have each been greatly affected by advances in creative design and communications technologies. As the media composition of advertising has changed in the last century for both local and national advertising – from newspapers, outdoor and radio advertising to network and cable television, and most recently to internet and digital media – so too has been transformed the very concept of advertising, its functionality and its measurement.\nWe compare four sources of annual nominal U.S. aggregate advertising expenditure data – from the public sector Internal Revenue Service and the U.S. Census Bureau Survey of Service Industries, and the private sector McCann Erickson and Magna Global advertising agencies– that are available over various time periods. In nominal terms, we estimate the elasticity of advertising expenditures with respect to Gross Domestic Product, and find that this elasticity appears to have increased substantially beginning in the late 1990s – from about 1.4 to 1.9. The timing of this structural break coincides roughly with the decline of print, radio and network and cable television, and the dramatic increase in digital and internet-based advertising. \nTo understand the forces underlying this structural break in nominal advertising expenditures, data on media-specific advertising prices are needed, thereby converting nominal to real advertising. However, currently annual U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Producer Price Index data on digital and many other advertising media prices are only available beginning in 2010. The availability of media-specific quality-constant price indexes would not only enable researchers to trace more completely the recent impact of digital and internet advertising, but would also facilitate contemporary and longstanding issues to be addressed surrounding the measurement of advertising effects, including how variations in the durability of response to advertising across media are related to inter-media price differentials, and why heterogeneity among firms and industries may arise with respect to the procyclicality of advertising policies.
28161.zh_abstract: 广告业的两个组成部分——负责开发和制作信息的创意部门，以及通过各种媒体传输信息的通信部门——都受到了创意设计和通信技术进步的极大影响。在过去一个世纪中，无论是本地广告还是全国广告，其媒体构成都发生了变化——从报纸、户外和广播广告，到网络和有线电视，再到最近的互联网和数字媒体——广告的概念、功能及其衡量方式也随之发生了转变。

28160.title: The Color of Money: Federal vs. Industry Funding of University Research
28160.zh_title: 金钱的颜色：联邦与行业对大学研究的资助
28160.authors: Tania Babina, Alex Xi He, Sabrina T. Howell, Elisabeth Ruth Perlman, Joseph Staudt
28160.abstract: U.S. universities have experienced a shift in research funding away from federal and towards private industry sources. This paper evaluates whether the source of funding – federal or private industry – is relevant for commercialization of research outputs. We link person-level grant data from 22 universities to patent and career outcomes (including IRS W-2 records). To identify a causal effect, we exploit individual-level variation in exposure to narrow federal R&D programs stemming from pre-existing field specialization. We instrument for the researcher’s funding sources with aggregate supply shocks to federal funding within these narrow fields. The results show that a higher share of federal funding reduces patenting and the chances of joining an incumbent firm, while increasing the chances of high- tech entrepreneurship and of remaining employed in academia. A decline in the federal share of funding is offset by an increase in the private share of funding, which has opposite effects. We conclude that the incentives of private funders to appropriate research outputs have important implications for the trajectory of university researcher careers and intellectual property.
28160.zh_abstract: 美国大学的研究资助正从联邦来源转向私营行业来源。本文评估了资助来源——联邦还是私营行业——是否与研究产出的商业化相关。我们将来自22所大学的个人层面资助数据与专利和职业结果（包括美国国税局W-2记录）联系起来。为了识别因果效应，我们利用了个人层面在先前领域专业化基础上接触狭窄联邦研发项目的差异。我们用这些狭窄领域内联邦资助的总体供给冲击作为研究者资助来源的工具变量。结果显示，联邦资助比例越高，会降低专利申请和加入现有公司的机会，同时增加高科技创业和继续受雇于学术界的可能性。联邦资助份额的下降被私营资助份额的增加所抵消，而私营资助具有相反的效果。我们得出结论，私营资助者获取研究产出的激励对大学研究者职业轨迹和知识产权具有重要影响。
28160.meta: Programs：CF, ED, PR；JEL：G18, G38, I2, O3

28159.title: Nothing but the Truth? Private Information and Reporting on Corporate Social Responsibility
28159.zh_title: 唯有真相？企业社会责任的私人信息与报告
28159.authors: Jean-Etienne de Bettignies, Hua Fang Liu, David T. Robinson
28159.abstract: We develop and test a model in which firms can make non-verifiable statements about their CSR engagement, and hence may have incentives to mislead markets with exaggerated CSR claims. Firms may privately receive a signal correlated with their CSR engagement - e.g. a measure of greenhouse gas emissions - and have discretion over whether to publicly disclose it. Based on whether a signal is disclosed to them, and on what the signal is, markets form beliefs about the firm's CSR activities and the truthfulness of its claims. The model illustrates the disciplining effect of ex post private signal availability on firms' ex ante reporting on their CSR engagement. We test the model using a difference-in-differences approach that exploits special features of the introduction of the UK Companies Act of 2013, and find evidence supporting the model's predictions.
28159.zh_abstract: 我们开发并测试了一个模型，在该模型中，企业可以就其企业社会责任参与做出不可验证的陈述，因此可能有动机用夸大的企业社会责任声明来误导市场。企业可能私下收到一个与其企业社会责任参与相关的信号——例如温室气体排放的衡量指标——并有权决定是否公开披露该信号。基于信号是否被披露给它们以及信号的内容，市场会形成关于企业企业社会责任活动及其声明真实性的信念。该模型说明了事后私人信号可用性对企业事前关于其企业社会责任参与的报告的约束效应。我们利用英国2013年公司法引入的特殊特征，采用双重差分法对该模型进行了检验，并发现了支持模型预测的证据。
28159.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D62, J31, M14, M52, Q58

28158.title: The Effect of Occupational Licensing Stringency on the Teacher Quality Distribution
28158.zh_title: 职业许可严格程度对教师质量分布的影响
28158.authors: Bradley Larsen, Ziao Ju, Adam Kapor, Chuan Yu
28158.abstract: Concerned about the low academic ability of public school teachers, in the 1990s and 2000s, some states increased licensing stringency to weed out low-quality candidates, while others decreased restrictions to attract high-quality candidates. We offer a theoretical model justifying both reactions. Using data from 1991–2007 on licensing requirements and teacher quality—as measured by the selectivity of teachers’ undergraduate institutions—we find that stricter licensing requirements, especially those emphasizing academic coursework, increase the left tail of the quality distribution for secondary school teachers without significantly decreasing quality for high-minority or high-poverty districts.
28158.zh_abstract: 出于对公立学校教师学术能力低下的担忧，在20世纪90年代和21世纪初，一些州提高了许可的严格程度以淘汰低质量候选人，而另一些州则减少了限制以吸引高质量候选人。我们提出了一个理论模型来证明这两种反应都是合理的。利用1991年至2007年关于许可要求和教师质量（以教师本科院校的选择性衡量）的数据，我们发现，更严格的许可要求，尤其是那些强调学术课程的要求，增加了中学教师质量分布的左尾，同时并未显著降低高少数民族或高贫困学区的教师质量。
28158.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：I2, J2, J4, J5, K2, K31, L5, L8

28199.title: Is Air Pollution Regulation Too Lenient? Evidence from US Offset Markets
28199.zh_title: 空气污染监管是否过于宽松？来自美国抵消市场的证据
28199.abstract: This paper describes a framework to estimate the marginal cost of air pollution regulation, then applies it to assess whether a large set of existing U.S. air pollution regulations have marginal benefits exceeding their marginal costs. The approach utilizes an important yet under-explored provision of the Clean Air Act requiring new or expanding plants to pay incumbents in the same or neighboring counties to reduce their pollution emissions. These “offset” regulations create several hundred decentralized, local markets for pollution that differ by pollutant and location. Economic theory and empirical tests suggest these market prices reveal information about the marginal cost of abatement for new or expanding firms. We compare estimates of the marginal benefit of abatement from leading air quality models to offset prices. We find that, for most regions and pollutants, the marginal benefits of pollution abatement exceed mean offset prices more than ten-fold. In at least one market, however, estimated marginal benefits are below offset prices.
28199.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个估算空气污染监管边际成本的框架，然后将其应用于评估美国现有大量空气污染监管的边际收益是否超过其边际成本。该方法利用了《清洁空气法》中一个重要但尚未充分探索的条款，该条款要求新建或扩建的工厂向同一或邻近县的现有企业支付费用，以减少其污染排放。这些“抵消”监管创建了数百个分散的、地方性的污染市场，这些市场因污染物和地点而异。经济理论和实证检验表明，这些市场价格揭示了新建或扩建企业减排的边际成本信息。我们将领先空气质量模型估算的减排边际收益与抵消价格进行比较。我们发现，对于大多数地区和污染物，减排的边际收益超过平均抵消价格的十倍以上。然而，在至少一个市场中，估算的边际收益低于抵消价格。

28198.title: The Remarkable Growth in Financial Economics, 1974-2020
28198.zh_title: 金融经济学的显著增长，1974-2020年
28198.abstract: Academic finance has grown and evolved in the 46 years since the Journal of Financial Economics (JFE) began publishing papers. This paper uses detailed data on the 2,858 papers written by 3,152 different authors published in the JFE from 1974-2019. Cumulatively, these papers have received 278,018 citations from other published papers as reflected in the Social Science Citation Index. Increasing computing power and electronic communication have likely resulted in trends toward more empirical work, more co-authorship, and more complex papers. Growth in the demand for finance faculty has driven up faculty salaries, and therefore the demand for journal services.
28198.zh_abstract: 自《金融经济学杂志》（JFE）开始发表论文以来的46年间，学术金融学已经发展并演变。本文使用了1974年至2019年间发表在JFE上的2858篇论文的详细数据，这些论文由3152位不同的作者撰写。累计而言，这些论文在社会科学引文索引中获得了来自其他已发表论文的278018次引用。计算能力的增强和电子通信的发展可能导致实证研究增多、合著增加以及论文更复杂的趋势。对金融教师需求的增长推高了教师薪资，从而也增加了对期刊服务的需求。

28197.title: Zombies at Large? Corporate Debt Overhang and the Macroeconomy
28197.zh_title: 僵尸企业横行？企业债务积压与宏观经济
28197.authors: Òscar Jordà, Martin Kornejew, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
28197.abstract: With business leverage at record levels, the effects of corporate debt overhang on growth and investment have become a prominent concern. In this paper, we study the effects of corporate debt overhang based on long-run cross-country data covering the near- universe of modern business cycles. We show that business credit booms typically do not leave a lasting imprint on the macroeconomy. Quantile local projections indicate that business credit booms do not affect the economy’s tail risks either. Yet in line with theory, we find that the economic costs of corporate debt booms rise when inefficient debt restructuring and liquidation impede the resolution of corporate financial distress and make it more likely that corporate zombies creep along.
28197.zh_abstract: 随着企业杠杆率达到创纪录水平，企业债务积压对增长和投资的影响已成为一个突出的担忧。在本文中，我们基于覆盖现代商业周期近乎全貌的长期跨国数据，研究了企业债务积压的影响。我们表明，企业信贷繁荣通常不会对宏观经济留下持久印记。分位数局部投影表明，企业信贷繁荣也不会影响经济的尾部风险。然而，与理论一致，我们发现，当低效的债务重组和清算阻碍企业财务困境的解决，并使得企业僵尸化更可能蔓延时，企业债务繁荣的经济成本就会上升。
28197.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, G32, G33, N20

28196.title: Cybersecurity Risk
28196.authors: Chris Florackis, Christodoulos Louca, Roni Michaely, Michael Weber
28196.abstract: Using textual analysis and comparing cybersecurity-risk disclosures of firms that were hacked to others that were not, we propose a novel firm-level measure of cybersecurity risk for all US-listed firms. We then examine whether cybersecurity risk is priced in the cross-section of stock returns. Portfolios of firms with high exposure to cybersecurity risk outperform other firms, on average, by up to 8.3% per year. At the same time, high-exposure firms perform poorly in periods of high cybersecurity risk. Reassuringly, the measure is higher in information-technology industries, correlates with characteristics linked to firms hit by cyberattacks, and predicts future cyberattacks.
28196.zh_abstract: 利用文本分析，并比较被黑客攻击的公司与未被攻击公司的网络安全风险披露，我们为所有美国上市公司提出了一种新颖的公司层面网络安全风险度量指标。然后，我们检验了网络安全风险是否在股票回报的横截面上被定价。高网络安全风险敞口的公司投资组合平均每年比其他公司表现高出8.3%。同时，高敞口公司在网络安全风险高企时期表现不佳。令人欣慰的是，该指标在信息技术行业更高，与遭受网络攻击公司的特征相关，并能预测未来的网络攻击。

28195.title: Do Enlarged Fiscal Deficits Cause Inflation: The Historical Record
28195.zh_title: 扩大的财政赤字会导致通货膨胀吗：历史记录
28195.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Mickey D. Levy
28195.abstract: In this paper we survey the historical record for over two centuries on the connection between expansionary fiscal policy and inflation. As a backdrop, we briefly lay out several theoretical approaches to the effects of fiscal deficits on inflation: the earlier Keynesian and monetarist approaches; and modern approaches incorporating expectations and forward looking behavior: unpleasant monetarist arithmetic and the fiscal theory of the price level.
28195.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们调查了两个多世纪以来关于扩张性财政政策与通货膨胀之间联系的历史记录。作为背景，我们简要阐述了关于财政赤字对通货膨胀影响的几种理论方法：早期的凯恩斯主义和货币主义方法；以及包含预期和前瞻性行为的现代方法：不愉快的货币主义算术和价格水平的财政理论。

28194.title: Who Benefits From Attending Effective High Schools?
28194.zh_title: 谁从就读有效高中中受益？
28194.authors: C. Kirabo Jackson, Shanette C. Porter, John Q. Easton, Sebastián Kiguel
28194.abstract: We estimate the longer-run effects of attending an effective high school (one that improves a combination of test scores, survey measures of socio-emotional development, and behaviors in 9th grade) for students who are more versus less educationally advantaged (i.e., likely to attain more years of education based on 8th-grade characteristics). All students benefit from attending effective schools, but the least advantaged students experience larger improvements in high-school graduation, college going, and school-based arrests. This heterogeneity is not solely due to less-advantaged groups being marginal for particular outcomes. Commonly used test-score value-added understates the long-run importance of effective schools, particularly for less-advantaged populations. Patterns suggest this partly reflects less-advantaged students being relatively more responsive to non-test-score dimensions of school quality.
28194.zh_abstract: 我们估算了就读有效高中（即能提高九年级考试成绩、社会情感发展调查指标和行为综合表现的高中）对教育优势程度不同（即基于八年级特征可能获得更多教育年限）的学生的长期影响。所有学生都从就读有效学校中受益，但最不具优势的学生在高中毕业、大学入学和校内逮捕方面经历了更大的改善。这种异质性并不仅仅是因为弱势群体在特定结果上处于边际状态。常用的考试成绩增值指标低估了有效学校的长期重要性，特别是对弱势群体而言。模式表明，这在一定程度上反映了弱势学生对学校质量的非考试成绩维度相对更敏感。
28194.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I20, J0

28193.title: A Unified Model of Cohort Mortality for Economic Analysis
28193.zh_title: 用于经济分析的队列死亡率统一模型
28193.abstract: We propose a dynamic production function of population health and mortality from birth onwards. Our parsimonious model provides an excellent fit for the mortality and survival curves for both primate and human populations since 1816. The model sheds light on the dynamics behind many phenomena documented in the literature, including (i) the existence and evolution of mortality gradients across socio-economic statuses, (ii) non-monotonic dynamic effects of in-utero shocks, (iii) persistent or “scarring” effects of wars and (iv) mortality displacement after large temporary shocks such as extreme weather.
28193.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个从出生开始的人口健康与死亡率的动态生产函数。我们的简约模型对自1816年以来的灵长类动物和人类种群的死亡率与生存曲线均提供了极佳的拟合。该模型揭示了文献中记载的许多现象背后的动态机制，包括：(i) 不同社会经济地位之间死亡率梯度的存在与演变，(ii) 子宫内冲击的非单调动态效应，(iii) 战争的持续性或“疤痕”效应，以及 (iv) 极端天气等大型暂时性冲击后的死亡率位移。

28192.title: Toward a Uniform Classification of Nurse Practitioner Scope of Practice Laws
28192.zh_title: 迈向执业护士执业范围法律的统一分类
28192.abstract: Many states’ scope of practice laws limit the ability of nurse practitioners to deliver care by requiring physician supervision of their practices and prescribing activities. A robust literature has evolved around examining the role of these scope of practice laws in various contexts, including labor market outcomes, healthcare access, healthcare prices, and the delivery of care for specific diseases. Unfortunately, these studies use different, and sometimes conflicting, measures of scope of practice laws, limiting their comparability and overall usefulness to policymakers and future researchers. We address this salient problem by providing a recommended coding of nurse practitioner scope of practice laws over a 24-year period based on actual statutory and regulatory language. Our classification of scope of practice laws solves an important problem within this growing literature and provides a solid legal foundation for researchers as they continue to investigate the effects of these laws.
28192.zh_abstract: 许多州的执业范围法律通过要求医生监督执业护士的实践和处方活动，限制了其提供护理的能力。围绕这些执业范围法律在不同情境下的作用，已形成了丰富的文献，包括劳动力市场结果、医疗可及性、医疗价格以及特定疾病护理的提供。不幸的是，这些研究使用了不同且有时相互矛盾的执业范围法律衡量标准，限制了它们的可比性以及对政策制定者和未来研究者的整体实用性。我们通过基于实际成文法和监管语言，提供一个24年期间执业护士执业范围法律的推荐编码，来解决这一突出问题。我们对执业范围法律的分类解决了这一不断增长的文献中的一个重要问题，并为研究者继续调查这些法律的影响提供了坚实的法律基础。

28191.title: The Career Evolution of the Sex Gap in Wages: Discrimination vs. Human Capital Investment
28191.zh_title: 工资性别差距的职业演变：歧视与人力资本投资
28191.abstract: Several studies find that there is little sex gap in wages at labor market entry, and that the sex gap in wages emerges (and grows) with time in the labor market. This evidence is consistent with (i) there is little or no sex discrimination in wages at labor market entry, and (ii) the emergence of the sex gap in wages with time in the labor market reflects differences between women and men in human capital investment (and other decisions), with women investing less early in their careers. Indeed, some economists explicitly interpret the evidence this way. We show that this interpretation ignores two fundamental implications of the human capital model, and that differences in investment can complicate the interpretation of both the starting sex gap in wages (or absence of a gap), and the differences in “returns” to experience. We then estimate stylized structural models of human capital investment and wage growth to identify the effects of discrimination (or other sources of a starting pay gap) and differences in human capital investment.
28191.zh_abstract: 多项研究发现，在进入劳动力市场时工资的性别差距很小，而工资的性别差距随着在劳动力市场的时间推移而出现（并扩大）。这一证据与以下两点一致：(i) 在进入劳动力市场时，工资方面几乎没有或根本没有性别歧视，以及 (ii) 工资性别差距随劳动力市场时间推移而出现，反映了女性和男性在人力资本投资（及其他决策）上的差异，女性在职业生涯早期投资较少。事实上，一些经济学家明确以此方式解释这一证据。我们表明，这种解释忽略了人力资本模型的两个基本含义，并且投资差异可能使对起始工资性别差距（或差距缺失）以及经验“回报”差异的解释复杂化。然后，我们估计了人力资本投资和工资增长的简约结构模型，以识别歧视（或起始工资差距的其他来源）与人力资本投资差异的影响。

28190.title: The Political Economy of Deep Integration
28190.zh_title: 深度一体化的政治经济学
28190.abstract: Modern trade agreements no longer emphasize basic trade liberalization but instead focus on international policy coordination in a much broader sense. In this paper we introduce the emerging literature on the political economy of such deep integration agreements. We organize our discussion around three main points. First, the political conflict surrounding trade agreements is moving beyond the classic antagonism of exporter interests who gain from trade and import-competing interests who lose from trade. Second, there is a more intense popular backlash against deep integration agreements than there was against shallow integration agreements. And third, the welfare economics of trade agreements have become more complex, in the sense that the insight that "free trade is good" is no longer sufficient as a guide to evaluating the efficiency of international agreements.
28190.zh_abstract: 现代贸易协定不再强调基本的贸易自由化，而是聚焦于更广泛意义上的国际政策协调。在本文中，我们介绍了关于此类深度一体化协定的政治经济学新兴文献。我们围绕三个主要观点组织讨论。首先，围绕贸易协定的政治冲突正在超越经典的从贸易中获益的出口商利益与因贸易受损的进口竞争利益之间的对立。其次，与浅层一体化协定相比，针对深度一体化协定的民众反弹更为激烈。第三，贸易协定的福利经济学变得更加复杂，因为“自由贸易是好的”这一见解不再足以作为评估国际协定效率的指南。

28189.title: Horizonal Merger Analysis
28189.abstract: Economic analysis of competition regulation is most developed in the domain of horizontal mergers, and modern agency guidelines reflect a substantial consensus on the appropriate template for merger assessment. Nevertheless, official protocols are understood to rest on a problematic market definition exercise, to use HHIs and ΔHHIs in ways that conflict with standard models, and more broadly to diverge with how economic analysis of proposed mergers should be and often is conducted. These gaps, unfortunately, are more consequential than is generally appreciated. Moreover, additional unrecognized errors and omissions are at least as important: analysis of efficiencies, which are thought to justify a permissive approach, fails to draw on the most relevant fields of economics; entry is often a misanalyzed afterthought; official information collection and decision protocols violate basic tenets of decision analysis; and single-sector, partial equilibrium analysis is employed despite the presence of substantial distortions (many due to imperfect competition) in many sectors of the economy. This article elaborates these deficiencies, offers preliminary analysis of how they can best be addressed, and identifies priorities for further research.
28189.zh_abstract: 竞争监管的经济分析在横向并购领域最为成熟，现代机构指南反映了对并购评估适当模板的实质性共识。然而，官方协议被认为依赖于有问题的市场界定练习，以与标准模型相冲突的方式使用赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数（HHI）和ΔHHI，并且更广泛地说，与经济分析应该如何以及通常如何进行拟议并购评估存在分歧。不幸的是，这些差距比通常认识到的更为重要。此外，其他未被认识到的错误和遗漏至少同样重要：被认为证明宽松方法合理性的效率分析未能借鉴最相关的经济学领域；进入往往是被错误分析的事后想法；官方信息收集和决策协议违反了决策分析的基本原则；并且在经济许多部门存在大量扭曲（许多源于不完全竞争）的情况下，仍采用单一部门、局部均衡分析。本文阐述了这些缺陷，提供了如何最好地解决这些问题的初步分析，并确定了进一步研究的优先事项。

28188.title: Effects of English Learner Reclassification Policies on Academic Trajectories
28188.zh_title: 英语学习者重新分类政策对学业轨迹的影响
28188.authors: Julian Betts, Laura Hill, Karen Bachofer, Joseph Hayes, Andrew Lee, Andrew Zau
28188.abstract: In California 38% of students are either current or former English Learners (ELs). A crucial decision in their educational trajectory is when to reclassify ELs. Upon reclassification, ELs cease to receive language supports, but have more opportunities to take the same courses as fluent English speakers. This paper uses regression discontinuity in California’s two largest school districts to ask: “Are ELs being reclassified at the right time?” In most cases the districts were reclassifying students appropriately, with no discontinuity for outcomes including test scores and graduation on time. Exceptions in which those meeting the reclassification criteria subsequently performed worse were resolved with Los Angeles’s newer reclassification policy.
28188.zh_abstract: 在加利福尼亚州，38%的学生是当前或曾经的英语学习者（ELs）。他们学业轨迹中的一个关键决策是何时对ELs进行重新分类。重新分类后，ELs不再接受语言支持，但有更多机会与流利英语使用者修读相同课程。本文利用加利福尼亚州两个最大学区的断点回归设计来探究：“ELs是否在正确的时间被重新分类？”在大多数情况下，学区恰当地对学生进行了重新分类，在包括考试成绩和按时毕业在内的结果上没有出现不连续性。例外情况是，那些符合重新分类标准的学生随后表现更差，而洛杉矶的新重新分类政策解决了这一问题。

28187.title: Modern US Workers’ Compensation and Work-Related Injury: No Evidence of Moral Hazard
28187.zh_title: 现代美国工人赔偿与工伤：无道德风险证据
28187.abstract: We exploit recent decades of US state-level reforms to the generosity of workers’ compensation programs to estimate the associated moral hazard, utilizing an event- study design and analyzing 9 separate reform categories. The reforms vary - some affecting benefit size, some the probability of receiving benefits; some paid in cash, some in-kind; some constituting increases, some decreases, in generosity. Across the board, we find no evidence of resulting changes in workplace injuries, and, generally, can rule out even moderate moral hazard responses for severe and less severe injuries, suggesting a key moral hazard cost of workers’ compensation benefits is negligible.
28187.zh_abstract: 我们利用近几十年来美国各州对工人赔偿计划慷慨程度的改革，利用事件研究设计并分析9个独立的改革类别，来估计相关的道德风险。这些改革各不相同——有些影响福利规模，有些影响获得福利的概率；有些以现金支付，有些以实物支付；有些增加了慷慨程度，有些则减少了。总体而言，我们没有发现由此导致的工作场所伤害变化的证据，并且通常可以排除对严重和不太严重伤害的适度道德风险反应，这表明工人赔偿福利的一个关键道德风险成本可以忽略不计。

28186.title: A Theory of the Nominal Character of Stock Securities
28186.zh_title: 股票证券名义特征的理论
28186.abstract: We construct recursive solutions for, and study the properties of the dynamic equilibrium of an economy with three types of agents: (i) house-hold/investors who supply labor with a finite elasticity, consume a large variety of goods that are not perfect substitutes and trade government bonds; (ii) firms that produce those varieties of goods, receive productivity shocks and set prices in a Calvo manner; (iii) a government that collects an income-driven fiscal surplus and acts mechanically, buying and selling bonds in accordance with a Taylor policy rule based on expected inflation. In this setting we show that stock market returns are much less than one-for-one related to inflation over a one-year holding period, which means that stock securities have a strong nominal character. We also show that their nominal character diminishes as the length of the stock-holding period increases, in accordance with empirical evidence.
28186.zh_abstract: 我们构建了递归解，并研究了一个包含三类代理人的经济体的动态均衡性质：(i) 家庭/投资者，他们以有限弹性提供劳动力，消费大量非完全替代品，并交易政府债券；(ii) 企业，它们生产这些差异化产品，受到生产率冲击，并以卡尔沃方式设定价格；(iii) 政府，它征收与收入相关的财政盈余，并机械地运作，根据基于预期通胀的泰勒政策规则买卖债券。在此设定下，我们表明，在一年持有期内，股票市场回报与通胀的关联远小于一对一，这意味着股票证券具有很强的名义特征。我们还表明，随着股票持有期长度的增加，其名义特征会减弱，这与经验证据一致。

28185.title: Firms' Exposures to Geographic Risks
28185.zh_title: 企业对地理风险的暴露
28185.authors: Bernard Dumas, Tymur Gabuniya, Richard C. Marston
28185.abstract: The distinction between domicile and place of business is becoming more and more relevant as a growing number of firms have activities abroad. In most statistical studies of international stock returns, a firm is included in a country’s index if its headquarters are located in that country. This classification scheme ignores the operations of the firm. We propose, instead, to measure the firms’ exposures to “geographic zones” according to the place where they conduct business. As a representation of “geographic risks”, we synthesize zone factors from all firms in the dataset, be they domestic firms or multinationals. And we show the properties of the exposures to the zone factors.
28185.zh_abstract: 随着越来越多的企业在海外开展业务，注册地与营业地之间的区别变得越来越重要。在大多数关于国际股票回报的统计研究中，如果一家公司的总部位于某个国家，该公司就会被纳入该国的指数。这种分类方案忽略了企业的实际运营情况。我们提出，应根据企业开展业务的地点来衡量其对“地理区域”的风险暴露。作为“地理风险”的代表，我们从数据集中的所有企业（无论是国内企业还是跨国公司）中综合出区域因子。我们展示了这些区域因子风险暴露的特性。

28184.title: Common Shocks in Stocks and Bonds
28184.zh_title: 股票与债券中的共同冲击
28184.abstract: We propose an approach to identifying economic shocks (monetary, growth, and risk-premium news) from stock returns and Treasury yield changes, which allows us to study the drivers of asset prices at a daily frequency since the early 1980s. We apply the identification to examine investors’ responses to news from the Fed and key macro announcements. We uncover two risk-premium shocks—time-varying compensation for discount-rate and cash-flow news—which have distinct effects on stocks and bonds. Since the mid-1990s, the Fed-induced reductions in both risk premium sources have generated high average stock returns but an ambiguous response in bonds on FOMC days.
28184.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种从股票回报和国债收益率变化中识别经济冲击（货币、增长和风险溢价新闻）的方法，这使得我们能够研究自20世纪80年代初以来每日频率下资产价格的驱动因素。我们应用这种识别方法来考察投资者对美联储和关键宏观公告新闻的反应。我们发现了两种风险溢价冲击——对贴现率和现金流新闻的时变补偿——它们对股票和债券有不同的影响。自20世纪90年代中期以来，美联储引发的这两种风险溢价来源的降低，在联邦公开市场委员会会议日产生了较高的平均股票回报，但债券的反应却不明确。

28183.title: Gender Differences in Negotiation and Policy for Improvement
28183.zh_title: 谈判中的性别差异与改进政策
28183.abstract: Men more than women succeed when negotiating over labor-market outcomes, and gender differences in negotiation likely contribute to the gender wage gap and to horizontal and vertical segregation in the labor market. We review the evidence on the many initiatives that have been put in place to reduce the effect of gender differences in negotiation. Categorizing these as either ‘fix-the-women’ or ‘fix-the-institutions’ initiatives we find serious challenges to the former. Women do not appear to be broken and encouraging them to negotiate more and differently often backfires. The evidence suggests that ‘fix-the-institution’ initiatives are more effective in reducing gender differences in outcomes. Concerns of adverse effects of banning negotiations or salary history requests have not materialized, and preliminary evidence points to reductions in the gender differences in negotiation outcomes. The strongest evidence on effectiveness in narrowing gender disparities is found for policies that increase transparency. Numerous studies find that gender differences in negotiation diminish when it is clear what to expect from the negotiation and suggest that initiatives which improve transparency are likely to help equalize opportunities at the bargaining table.
28183.zh_abstract: 在劳动力市场结果的谈判中，男性比女性更成功，而谈判中的性别差异可能导致了性别工资差距以及劳动力市场中的横向和纵向隔离。我们回顾了为减少谈判中性别差异影响而实施的众多举措的证据。将这些举措分为“修复女性”或“修复制度”两类，我们发现前者面临严峻挑战。女性似乎并没有问题，鼓励她们更多、更不同地谈判往往会适得其反。证据表明，“修复制度”的举措在减少结果中的性别差异方面更为有效。对禁止谈判或薪资历史要求的负面影响的担忧并未成为现实，初步证据表明这些举措减少了谈判结果中的性别差异。在缩小性别差距的有效性方面，最有力的证据来自提高透明度的政策。大量研究发现，当谈判预期结果明确时，谈判中的性别差异会减小，这表明提高透明度的举措可能有助于在谈判桌上实现机会均等。
